videos.summary_source_text:
Coach Prime and Colorado’s candidates to make the leap in 2026 On today’s DNVR Buffs Podcast, Jake Schwanitz and Scott Procter discuss the players who could make the leap and become an impact player for Coach Prime and Colorado in 2026. Danny Scudero breaks into EA Sports’ top 10 wide receivers for College Football 27. Discussing the first and second flip in the Ben’Jarvius Shumaker saga and what to make of high school recruiting in today’s era. Takeaways from the guys’ trip to Boulder to hear Derrick White’s plan and deal to help revitalize Colorado men’s basketball and much more.

videos.title: Red Wings Dylan Larkin Reportedly Picks Dallas Stars As “Destination Of Choice” | DLLS Stars Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Red Wings Dylan Larkin Reportedly Picks Dallas Stars As “Destination Of Choice” | DLLS Stars Podcast Become a DIEHARD! alldlls.com/diehard

Sportsnet’s Nick Kypreos reported on Tuesday that Detroit Red Wings captain Dylan Larkin has selected the Dallas Stars as his preferred “destination of choice” after he requested a trade back at the beginning of June. Three weeks ago, we spent a good chunk of time talking about whether Larkin to Dallas made any sense and how it might work with the financials of the Stars current salary cap squeeze. Now that we are getting closer to the NHL Draft and Free Agency, Jason Robertson trade rumors are swirling and Larkin could be a replacement option. Also today, there was a bevy of trades on Tuesday and we will go through them all, keeping you up-to-date on all the latest moves around the NHL.

Google June 2026 Spam Update: What It Means for SEO, AI Content & Rankings

Google released the June 2026 Spam Update on June 24, visible on the Search Status Dashboard, and it may take days or weeks to roll out globally across all languages. The update upgrades Google’s automated spam-detection systems (SpamBrain), which can cause major ranking shifts—sites may drop sharply, links may be devalued, or some sites may benefit as competitors fall. The script reviews recent Google updates, notes rollout durations can vary widely, and highlights spam policy areas like scaled content, site reputation/parasite SEO, expired domains, spammy links, and thin content. It explains AI content isn’t inherently penalized if it’s helpful and original, shares examples of sites impacted, and advises checking Search Console, confirming timing, reviewing policies, and waiting for rollout completion before making changes, as recovery can take months.

videos.title: Jack Leiter's Ankle Surgery Leaves Texas Rangers With A Rotation Issue | DLLS Rangers
videos.summary_source_text:
Jack Leiter's Ankle Surgery Leaves Texas Rangers With A Rotation Issue | DLLS Rangers Become a DIEHARD! alldlls.com/diehard

An ALLCITY Network Production

The Texas Rangers are in scramble mode with their starting rotation after right-hander Jack Leiter underwent surgery Tuesday to remove a loose body from his right ankle. The team didn’t offer a timeline for his return, but he could be out until August. In the meantime, the Rangers will search for answers to fill Leiter’s spot. There are multiple internal candidates, beginning with Cal Quantrill and Joe Ross. The season won’t stop for them. They finished a three-game series at Miami on Wednesday and still have seven games to go on their road trip. Next up: a four-game series at Toronto, whose fans are stuffing the All-Star Game ballot box. It could cost Ezequiel Duran his first All-Star appearance.

videos.title: Digital tillit och federativ infrastruktur – nyckeln till säker samverkan mellan aktörer

videos.title: 24.06.26 - RIFT Training
videos.summary_source_text:
24.06.26 - RIFT Training RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. videos.title: Jag intervjuade den smarta Kina-bilroboten – tills hon blev sur på mig!
videos.summary_source_text:
Jag intervjuade den smarta Kina-bilroboten – tills hon blev sur på mig! Här kommer min första personliga intervju med en Robot!

Cherys bilrobot Mornine är till salu – och hon vet väldigt mycket. Som hur tysk bilindustri bäst borde möta den Kinesiska, varför Kinesiska bilar är billigare än tyska - även om båda utvecklats och tillverkas i kina, vilka Cherys största utmaningar är i Sverige, hur AI påverkar bilutvecklingen, när man kommer tjäna pengar i Sverige, vilka Cherys och VW:s styrkor och svagheter är. 
Och så vidare.

Men hon har också lite koll på vad lycka är, hur bilarbetarna mår och varför födelsetalen är låga. Men när demokrati kommer på tal blir hon mycket tyst och i slutet av intervjun blir hon riktigt trött på mig och mina frågor, och knuffas och använder olika tekniker för att får slut på det hela. 

Kan en robot ha känslor? Mornine är i alla fall inte iskallt nollställd, utan blir både glad, sur, speedad , växlar språk och blir sarkastisk!

Vad hon verkligen vill tala om är självklart Cherys bilar och deras avancerade teknik! Så det talar vi också om. Den sista frågan blev: "Vad tycker du om mina frågor?"   

Gissa vad hon svarade?

Se till att prenumerera så du inte missar något!

Sakana Fugu Ultra vs Fusion vs Claude Opus 4.8 (42 Builds + Goldie Bench): Is It Fable 5-Level?

The video reviews Sakana Fugu Ultra after several days of release, testing whether it matches “Fable 5-level intelligence” claims by running 42 builds using the same prompts across Fugu Ultra, Fusion (OpenRouter), and Claude Opus 4.8, plus Goldie Bench leaderboard comparisons. The script explains Fugu as a multi-agent orchestration system that fuses outputs from closed and open models, contrasting it with Fusion’s pay-per-token API pricing versus Fugu’s flat subscription with token limits and frequent lockouts, slow responses, and one-shot workflows. Side-by-side build demos (solar system, runner, fireworks, dungeon crawler, open world) show mixed results but generally stronger outputs from Fugu Ultra, with Fusion often close or better on some examples and Opus 4.8 frequently failing. Benchmarks cited include Fugu leading LiveCode Bench but trailing Fable 5 on SWE Bench Pro and Terminal Bench, and a brief comparison of Fugu Ultra vs cheaper Fugu Mini. The episode ends by promoting the AI Profit Boardroom agent operating system integrating Sakana, Fusion, Claude, and other tools.

videos.title: Werenski Update, Jarmo Busy in Buffalo, and Trade Talks ft. Aaron Portzline & Greg Wyshynski
videos.summary_source_text:
Werenski Update, Jarmo Busy in Buffalo, and Trade Talks ft. Aaron Portzline & Greg Wyshynski With the 2026 NHL Draft just around the corner, the NHL trade market is in overdrive, and Jeff Marek is joined by Greg Wyshynski for another edition of MVSW to break down everything that's happened across the league during one of the busiest weeks of the offseason. From blockbuster trades and sign-and-trades to teams positioning themselves for Friday night's first round, Jeff and Greg examine the biggest deals, the winners and losers so far, which clubs are still looking to make a splash, and what to expect over the next 48 hours as the draft officially gets underway. They also discuss the latest league-wide rumors, front office strategies, and how the NHL landscape continues to shift with every move.

Later in the show, Aaron Portzline joins Jeff to dive into the latest surrounding Columbus Blue Jackets star Zach Werenski, including where things stand ahead of an expected post-draft meeting between the two sides. They also discuss former Blue Jackets GM Jarmo Kekäläinen and the aggressive direction he's taking with the Buffalo Sabres, plus revisit Mike Babcock's brief and controversial tenure in Columbus, what went wrong, and how it continues to shape conversations around his NHL return.

videos.title: Giannis to Miami SHOCKS NBA + Are the Denver Nuggets Preparing a BLOCKBUSTER Trade? Morning LIV(E)
videos.summary_source_text:
Giannis to Miami SHOCKS NBA + Are the Denver Nuggets Preparing a BLOCKBUSTER Trade? Morning LIV(E) The NBA offseason just delivered its first massive blockbuster as Giannis Antetokounmpo heads to the Miami Heat! Liv breaks down what the Giannis trade means for both Miami and Milwaukee, whether the Heat are now legitimate championship contenders, and what the future holds for the Bucks in a post-Giannis era.

Plus, the Denver Nuggets made a surprising move on draft night by trading out of the first round. Is Denver quietly stockpiling assets for a blockbuster trade of their own? Liv discusses the Nuggets' draft strategy, rumors surrounding Jaylen Brown, potential trade pieces including Aaron Gordon and Christian Braun, and whether Denver is preparing to make a major splash around Nikola Jokić this offseason.

videos.title: Avalanche Make Another Trade With Nashville and Send Jack Drury to the Predators
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Make Another Trade With Nashville and Send Jack Drury to the Predators The Colorado Avalanche shake up their roster, sending Jack Drury to the Nashville Predators for Fedor Svechkov and Zachary L’Heureux. Did the Avs sacrifice too much depth for cap space, or will these young forwards pay off under the leadership of Nathan MacKinnon and Gabriel Landeskog?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down the trade’s implications, questioning LaRue’s reputation for suspensions and Svechkov’s faceoff struggles. The conversation explores the financial strategy behind the move, Nashville fans’ reactions, and what losing an elite fourth-line center means for Colorado’s Stanley Cup hopes. Additional topics include major league trades—highlighting Alex Tuch’s blockbuster deal to the Washington Capitals—and the escalating market for defensemen like Bo Byram. Don’t miss sharp analysis of Martin Nečas’ breakout 100-point season and what the Avs must do to stay contenders in the evolving NHL landscape.

Jerome Miron-Imagn Images

videos.title: Byram Fallout & Capitals Add Tuch | Morning Cuppa Hockey
videos.summary_source_text:
Byram Fallout & Capitals Add Tuch | Morning Cuppa Hockey Season 3 of Morning Cuppa Hockey rolls on with Jonny Lazarus and Colby Cohen bringing you the latest news and notes from around the NHL as the offseason keeps heating up ahead of the 2026 Draft in Buffalo. With trades flying and first-round picks changing hands at a dizzying pace, Jonny and Colby break down everything you need to know before the puck drops on draft weekend.

Then at 9:15, Barstool's Chief joins the show to weigh in on the Blackhawks and what's been a polarizing offseason for Chicago. Kyle Davidson moved the fourth-overall pick to land Bowen Byram and Jordan Greenway from Buffalo in a blockbuster that has divided the fanbase — so what does it mean for Connor Bedard and the trajectory of this rebuild? Chief doesn't hold back.

And at 9:45, Washington Capitals centre Dylan Strome stops by for a candid conversation about life in DC as the Capitals' offseason ramps up. With Jordan Kyrou and now Alex Tuch both in the fold — Tuch arriving via sign-and-trade from Buffalo on an eight-year deal — and the Ovechkin situation hanging over everything, where does Strome fit in Washington's plans going forward? With questions swirling about the long-term depth down the middle and a roster being rebuilt to contend, Strome gives us his read on where this team is headed.

Don't miss a second of the daily hockey talk!

Fable 5 Returning Soon? New Claude Code, Bedrock Catalog & AWS Doc Leaks Explained

The episode reviews recent leaks suggesting Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 may return after being released on June 9 and pulled three days later, with new signals appearing June 24–25. videos.summary_source_text:
I Accidentally Built an AI Coding Startup 🧞‍♂️ Join Creator Magic here: https://mrc.fm/cmc

I set out to fix one small problem with Claude Code and somehow ended up building a startup. In this live build I walk you through Tank, the AI agent orchestrator my community accidentally turned into a real product, and I set the whole thing up on camera: the founding team, Slack, Claude Team, the GitHub repos and the roadmap.

Watch me go from a side project to a company in real time, messy bits and all. If you want the tools, the templates and the community behind it, come in here: https://mrc.fm/cmc

What I cover:

videos.title: 3 Different Shots to Play From the Bunker #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
3 Different Shots to Play From the Bunker #golfswing #golftips Most golfers can get the ball out of the bunker — but not with the control they want.
This video shows you three bunker shot levels: get it out, get it controlled, and get it spinning.
It all comes down to your entry point — where the club first enters the sand.
Start experimenting with how close to the ball you strike the sand to control spin, rollout, and stopping power.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. Most golfers can get the ball out of the bunker — but not with the control they want.

videos.title: TRADE STOVE IS HOT! Carolina Hurricanes in Trade Rumors for Alexander Nikishin
videos.summary_source_text:
TRADE STOVE IS HOT! Carolina Hurricanes in Trade Rumors for Alexander Nikishin After a wild Tuesday of trades, it seems like the NHL is not slowing down as more trades went down on Wednesday. Despite the Washington Capitals getting Alex Tuch, the Carolina Hurricanes are still in a great spot. That said, they have cropped up in trade rumors regarding Alexander Nikishin. Does it mean anything? On the Thursday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the Nikishin trade rumor situation. Darren Dreger posted on X/Twitter that the Hurricanes are hearing interest from teams about the young Russian defenseman, who just won the Stanley Cup. Taking interest doesn't mean that they will trade him away. Does it make sense to move on from him? Secondly, the Hurricanes announced on Wednesday night that they extended Jusso Valimaki to a one-year, $900,000 deal to keep him in the organization after acquiring him last season from the Utah Mammoth. He played a big role for the Chicago Wolves last season in the AHL, en route to a Calder Cup Final appearance. What does it mean moving forward? Lastly, Zach concludes the show by sharing his thoughts on what could be an interesting offseason for the Hurricanes. With most of the forward core signed, outside of two guys on the defense, what could the Hurricanes do to prepare for next season? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Anthropic Just Replaced Claude Code With New Claude Tag
videos.summary_source_text:
Anthropic Just Replaced Claude Code With New Claude Tag Anthropic just dropped Claude Tag, a new team version of Claude Code that works inside Slack, connects to company tools, and keeps tasks moving in public channels. But the bigger story is what came next: hidden AI reasoning blocks, encrypted thinking logs, replay risks, Japan’s new Fugu router model, and OpenAI’s new research on making alignment transfer across domains.

👉 Publish your expert AI skill as a paid agent app on Capafy: https://capafy.ai/

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉️ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com

📌 What You’ll See:
Anthropic launches Claude Tag in Slack with plans for wider rollout
SOURCE: https://www.reuters.com/technology/anthropic-launches-claude-tag-research-preview-slack-users-2026-06-23/

Claude Tag replaces the old Claude Slack chatbot for team workflows
SOURCE: https://m.economictimes.com/tech/artificial-intelligence/anthropic-launches-claude-tag-everything-you-need-to-know-about-the-slack-native-ai-agent/articleshow/131958086.cms

Matt Green exposes encrypted reasoning blocks in ChatGPT and Claude
SOURCE: https://blog.cryptographyengineering.com/2026/05/29/fooling-around-with-encrypted-reasoning-blobs/

Sakana AI launches Fugu as a router for Claude, GPT, and Gemini
SOURCE: https://sakana.ai/fugu/

OpenAI publishes new research on alignment that transfers across domains
SOURCE: https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.24014

🚨 Why It Matters
This is bigger than Anthropic launching another Claude product. AI is moving from private chat windows into real company workflows, while the hidden reasoning behind these systems is becoming a trust, security, and control problem. The next AI race is about who controls the agents inside teams.

videos.title: IQ + Mechanics = Unstoppable Shot
videos.summary_source_text:
IQ + Mechanics = Unstoppable Shot The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

About Train 2.0:
Train 2.0 is an online hockey development platform founded by Jason Yee: kinesiologist, former professional player, and UBC honors graduate. We give players and coaches a mechanical advantage by reverse-engineering elite NHL movements and making them available to players at every level.

#train2point0 #downhillskating #hockeytraining #NHL The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: 9 Free AI Skills That Feel Like Cheat Codes
videos.summary_source_text:
9 Free AI Skills That Feel Like Cheat Codes 9 free skills and plug-ins that make Claude Code, Codex, and other AI coding agents dramatically more useful, and yes, all of them are free.
Skills and plug-ins are reusable instruction files that give your AI agent a repeatable behavior instead of starting from scratch every time. In this video I break down 9 of my favorites, install them live, and put several of them head to head so you can see exactly what changes.

I cover GStack (turns Claude Code into a full virtual engineering team), Stop Slop (strips AI tells out of your writing), Graphify (turns any codebase or knowledge base into a queryable graph your agent can use as memory), Understand Anything (visual onboarding maps for any codebase), Last 30 Days (real time sentiment research across Reddit, X, YouTube, and more), Anthropic's Front End Design skill and the Taste skill (head to head design tests), and ReMotion vs HyperFrames (AI generated animations from a single prompt).

Every skill works across Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenClaw, Hermes, VS Code, and GitHub Copilot. Links to every single one below.

Discover More:
🛠️ Explore AI Tools & News: https://futuretools.io/
📰 Weekly Newsletter: https://futuretools.io/newsletter

Socials:

🖼️ Instagram: https://instagram.com/mr.eflow
🧵 Threads: https://www.threads.net/@mr.eflow
🟦 LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/matt-wolfe-30841712/
👍 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/mattrwolfe

Skills and plug-ins mentioned:
GStack: https://github.com/garrytan/gstack
Stop Slop: https://github.com/hardikpandya/stop-slop
Graphify: https://github.com/safishamsi/graphify
Understand Anything: https://github.com/Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything
Last 30 Days: https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill
Front End Design (Anthropic): https://www.skills.sh/anthropics/skills/frontend-design
Taste Skill: https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill
ReMotion: https://github.com/remotion-dev/remotion
HyperFrames: https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes

If you want more breakdowns like this, let me know in the comments and I'll keep them coming.

Let’s work together!

videos.title: 20 Second Form Fix: DB Bench Press
videos.summary_source_text:
20 Second Form Fix: DB Bench Press If your elbows flare straight out to the sides when you press, you are likely putting your shoulders in a worse position and taking tension off the chest. Instead, think about the dumbbells following the sides of a triangle: wider at the bottom, slightly in at the top.

Aim for about a 45 degree angle with your arms. This will protect your shoulders in the process and keep them healthy so that you can keep bench pressing over time.

At the bottom of each rep, you want to target the touch point. Bring the dumbbells down toward the outer line of your lower chest. This will make sure you are getting low enough to put stretch tension on the pecs at the bottom of the range of motion.

Follow this quick form fix so can you keep the press stronger, safer, and more effective for building your chest.

For more exercise how-tos and exercise form fixes, be sure to stay tuned to this channel and remember to subscribe so that you never miss another video from a physical therapist with a pro sports background as a PT and strength coach.

videos.title: Bussi's fiancée Mary talks Brandon, Stanley Cup on Never Offside | S2, Ep30
videos.summary_source_text:
Bussi's fiancée Mary talks Brandon, Stanley Cup on Never Offside | S2, Ep30 Julie and Cat are joined by Mary Raclawski, fiancée of Carolina Hurricanes goaltender Brandon Bussi, who shares behind-the-scenes stories about her and Brandon’s roller coaster ride of a hockey season. Mary tells the origin of their love story, recounts a life-changing car ride that took an unexpected detour, relives the emotions of watching her husband-to-be win the Stanley Cup, spills the tea on the Cup celebration you didn’t see, and plays a Stanley Cup/Carolina Hurricanes-themed game of “Superlatives.” 

Julie and Cat open the show with congratulations for friend and past podcast guest Carey Price on his selection to the Hockey Hall of Fame as Julie fangirls over the possibility of an expansion team in her hometown of Houston. The ladies cap the show recounting their favorite moments from Season 2 and share an exciting announcement about the future of the podcast.

Never Offside with Julie & Cat: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/mary-raclawski-joins-bussis-roller-coaster-ride-stanley/id1789625045?i=1000774035175

videos.summary_source_text:
Prata pengar med dina barn tidigare När ska du prata pengar med dina barn?

Jag hör hört alla möjliga varianter som när de blir tonåringar, när de fyller 18, när de tar studenten, när de gifter sig. Vi hittar alltid en anledning att skjuta upp det.

Men frågan är ofta inte när barnen är redo. Frågan är ofta när du är redo.

Ett exempel jag sett: ett barn som ville jobba inom vård men väljer ingenjörsutbildningen istället för att lönen är bättre. Familjen hade gått det bra ekonomiskt. Barnet visste inte om det. Hade de pratat om pengar tidigare hade barnet kunnat välja det de faktiskt ville.

videos.title: URINATING TOO OFTEN?  HERE'S WHEN TO WORRY | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
URINATING TOO OFTEN?  HERE'S WHEN TO WORRY | Dr. Mandell Are you urinating more often than usual? Waking up multiple times at night to use the bathroom? Constantly looking for the nearest restroom? Frequent urination can be caused by many different factors, including an enlarged prostate, elevated blood sugar, overactive bladder, urinary tract infections, medications, caffeine, alcohol, stress, anxiety, and other underlying health conditions. In this video, I'll explain what's considered normal, when you should be concerned, warning signs you should never ignore, and practical steps you can take to help reduce urinary frequency. You'll also learn how keeping a simple bladder diary, limiting bladder irritants, practicing bladder training, strengthening your pelvic floor muscles, and making a few lifestyle changes may help improve symptoms. If you've ever wondered whether your frequent urination is something to worry about, this video is for you.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: How to Judge Pace on Downhill Putts  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
How to Judge Pace on Downhill Putts  #golfswing #golftips Downhill putts are easy to overhit because gravity does most of the work. By focusing on playing the putt with just enough pace and letting the slope do the rest, you’ll improve distance control. This simple system helps you judge speed more accurately and avoid the long comeback putt. The goal is always the same — give yourself the best chance to avoid a three-putt.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. Downhill putts are easy to overhit because gravity does most of the work. videos.title: NHL Trade Market Explodes: Kyrou, Byram, Nemec ++ ft. Brian Burke, Julian McKenzie, & Rachel Kryshak
videos.summary_source_text:
NHL Trade Market Explodes: Kyrou, Byram, Nemec ++ ft. Brian Burke, Julian McKenzie, & Rachel Kryshak The NHL offseason is officially in overdrive. With the 2026 NHL Draft just days away, blockbuster trades are flying across the league and Jeff Marek is joined by Brian Burke, Julien McKenzie, and Rachel Doerrie to break down one of the busiest stretches of the summer so far.

The panel dives into the Washington Capitals acquiring Jordan Kyrou from the St. Louis Blues in exchange for Connor McMichael, prospect Milton Gastrin, and the 16th overall pick, a move that gives Washington another elite offensive weapon while St. Louis loads up on draft capital.

They also analyze the Chicago Blackhawks' aggressive push forward after landing Bowen Byram and Jordan Greenway from the Buffalo Sabres in exchange for Louis Crevier, the 4th overall pick, and the 45th overall selection. What does it mean for Connor Bedard, Chicago's rebuild, and Buffalo's draft plans?

Plus, the crew breaks down the Calgary Flames acquiring Simon Nemec and Maxim Tsyplakov from the New Jersey Devils in exchange for Etienne Morin, two conditional first-round picks, and a second-round selection as teams continue to reshape their futures before draft night.

With the Brady Tkachuk blockbuster still sending shockwaves throughout the NHL, Jeff, Brian, John, and Rachel discuss which teams could be the most active over the next 48 hours, who might be next to move, what contenders are trying to accomplish, and how the draft board could be impacted by the flurry of trades around the league.

As the NHL trade market reaches a fever pitch, don't miss this complete breakdown of the biggest stories, rumors, and moves shaping the future of the league ahead of the 2026 NHL Draft.

The panel dives into the Washington Capitals acquiring Jordan Kyrou from the St. Louis Blues in exchange for Connor McMichael, prospect Milton Gastrin, and the 16th overall pick, a move that gives Washington another elite offensive weapon while St. Louis loads up on draft capital.

They also analyze the Chicago Blackhawks' aggressive push forward after landing Bowen Byram and Jordan Greenway from the Buffalo Sabres in exchange for Louis Crevier, the 4th overall pick, and the 45th overall selection. What does it mean for Connor Bedard, Chicago's rebuild, and Buffalo's draft plans?

Plus, the crew breaks down the Calgary Flames acquiring Simon Nemec and Maxim Tsyplakov from the New Jersey Devils in exchange for Etienne Morin, two conditional first-round picks, and a second-round selection as teams continue to reshape their futures before draft night.

With the Brady Tkachuk blockbuster still sending shockwaves throughout the NHL, Jeff, Brian, John, and Rachel discuss which teams could be the most active over the next 48 hours, who might be next to move, what contenders are trying to accomplish, and how the draft board could be impacted by the flurry of trades around the league.

As the NHL trade market reaches a fever pitch, don't miss this complete breakdown of the biggest stories, rumors, and moves shaping the future of the league ahead of the 2026 NHL Draft.

videos.summary_source_text:
Two Tkachuks Unite in Florida and Byram Looks To Cash In Big With CHI | GS Off-Ice Special Edition Welcome back to another offseason edition of GS Off Ice! 

Mark Robinson and Jesse Montano are back for another episode of league-wide hockey talk, and there is TONS to talk about after yesterdays BIZZARE slate of trades that went through.

From the news of Brady Tkachuk joining his brother Matthew in Florida, to Bowen Byram leaving the excitement of Buffalo to play with Connor Bedard in Chicago, the NHL news since the conclusion of the Stanley Cup has been plentiful, and we're breaking it all down.

We're also talking about the Toronto Maple Leafs BIGGEST priorirites for the off-season, and we're grateful to have NHL.com Toronto correspondent Dave McCarthy joining us to chat about the Maple Leafs.

Among all the crazy trades over the last few days, Buffalo has been one of the most active teams, especially after trading young star defenseman Bowen Byram. We've got WGRZ TV's Nate Mills joining us to weigh in on all the moves Buffalo has made after their exciting run in the playoffs, and if these moves are setting them up for continued success.

videos.title: The 2 Keys (Spine Tilt + Momentum)
videos.summary_source_text:
The 2 Keys (Spine Tilt + Momentum) Click link in bio for lowest price on the Ball First Board. 
I explain the two essentials to shifting your weight like PGA Tour pros: spine tilt toward the target at impact and forward momentum as the lower body moves toward the target in transition. After studying 120 PGA Tour players, I found they all combine these two, while most amateurs only do one—either staying on the backside and scooping/casting, or overloading the lead side and then falling back during release. I use a throwing analogy to show why momentum forward prevents you from falling back and helps you strike ball-first. I demonstrate how to keep the upper body behind the ball (avoiding a reverse pivot), control hip movement on the backswing, and then shift to the lead side so you’re stable at impact for consistent, high-quality contact, and I mention the Ball First board as a training aid. videos.title: What Should Cowboys Fans EXPECT In 2026? Position-By-Position Reality Check
videos.summary_source_text:
What Should Cowboys Fans EXPECT In 2026? Position-By-Position Reality Check Become a DIEHARD! alldlls.com/diehard

The Cowboys have one of the most intriguing receiver duos in football, but what does the arrival of George Pickens mean for CeeDee Lamb? Does Lamb need a monster season to prove he's still among the NFL's elite, or will Pickens' presence make life easier for Dallas' No. 1 receiver?

Plus, Brian Schottenheimer recently talked about what he *hopes* and *expects* from the Cowboys this season. Those are two very different things. Jeff Cavanaugh, Jesse Holley, and Clarence Hill go position group by position group to separate realistic expectations from best-case hopes for the 2026 Dallas Cowboys.

🔹 Does CeeDee face more pressure with Pickens in town?

🔹 What should we actually expect from Dak Prescott and the offense?

🔹 Which position groups have the highest ceilings?

🔹 Where are Cowboys fans setting expectations too high?

🔹 Hope vs. expectation for every position group on the roster

Join us live and bring your questions in the chat!

#cowboys #dallascowboys #dakprescott #ceedeelamb #georgepickens #jerryjones

videos.summary_source_text:
Adam Richman Eats 126-Year-Old Texas BBQ! | Pro Moves Central Texas barbecue is the stuff of legend. Over the course of the next three episodes, host Adam Richman will be taking you on an epic journey through some of Hill Country's most distinct and celebrated barbecue establishments. The adventure begins today at Kreuz Market, the second oldest barbecue joint in the Lone Star State, and the crown jewel of Lockhart, the official "Barbecue Capital of Texas" as designated by the state legislature. Along for the ride is Texas Monthly BBQ editor Daniel Vaughn, who will be giving Adam all of the tips and tricks he needs to know to get the most out of his Kreuz experience. Come for the beef ribs and brisket, but stay for a heartwarming interview with legendary Kreuz Market pitmaster Roy Perez.

videos.title: Capitals Land Kyrou and Byram Heads to Chicago as NHL Draft Nears | Daily Faceoff Live
videos.summary_source_text:
Capitals Land Kyrou and Byram Heads to Chicago as NHL Draft Nears | Daily Faceoff Live The NHL offseason continues to deliver blockbuster moves.

Tyler Yaremchuk and Carter Hutton break down the stunning trade that sends Bowen Byram to the Chicago Blackhawks in exchange for the 4th overall pick and additional assets. Why did Chicago make this move? Is adding an established young defenseman the right call, or should the Blackhawks have used those assets to find another weapon for Connor Bedard?

The guys also revisit Chicago's decision to pass on Ivan Demidov last year and discuss what this latest move says about the organization's long-term vision.

Then, attention shifts to Buffalo. With multiple premium assets now in hand, could the Sabres be positioning themselves for another major move? Could Connor Hellebuyck or another star become a target?

Later, the Washington Capitals make a splash of their own by acquiring Jordan Kyrou from the St. Louis Blues. Was the price worth paying? How valuable is Connor McMichael, and who comes out ahead in this blockbuster?

Steven Ellis joins for The Next Wave to update his latest NHL Mock Draft, discuss whether the San Jose Sharks are locked in on Anton Stenberg at second overall, and break down the ripple effects of Chicago's surprising trade.

videos.title: GPT-6 Cyber Explained: Trillions of Parameters, 2M Context, Built to Hack
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT-6 Cyber Explained: Trillions of Parameters, 2M Context, Built to Hack Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
OpenAI is reportedly building GPT-6 Cyber — a cybersecurity-focused AI model trained to scan code for vulnerabilities, chain weaknesses into real exploits, and even write proof-of-concept attack code. Unlike standard models built to refuse dangerous requests, a Cyber model is built to engage with them. We break down what's confirmed, what's rumored, and why OpenAI is reportedly locking this one behind identity-verified, vetted access instead of releasing it to the public.

videos.title: I Dropped My Ego And Played My BEST Golf!
videos.summary_source_text:
I Dropped My Ego And Played My BEST Golf! Do forgiving golf clubs actually make you play better?

Guy takes the most forgiving clubs on the market onto the golf course for 9 holes to find out. From drivers to irons, we're putting forgiveness to the test in a real-world round to see if these clubs can save bad shots, lower scores, and help everyday golfers play better golf.

Can technology really make that much difference? Let's find out.


Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: Volvo XC70 provkörd i Kina!
videos.summary_source_text:
Volvo XC70 provkörd i Kina! I Kina säljs en Volvoversion av Lynk & Co 08, som är märkets storsäljare: XC70.
Det har sagts att den ska exporteras till 70 marknader. Men det var några år sedan det sades. Gäller det fortfarande?
Är den bättre än XC60? Eller till och med EX60?
Borde Volvo ta in den till Sverige? 
Än så länge är inte Kinesiska laddhybrider belagda med extra strafftullar, som elbilarna. Men det finns ett EU-förslag om just detta.
Jag har kört nya XC70 i Sanya, som är Kinas "Hawaii" och har mina egna teorier om hur Volvo ska kunna komma tillbaka på den Kinesiska marknaden.

Se till att prenumerera så du inte missar något!

videos.title: Almedalen 2026 - onsdag 24 juni
videos.summary_source_text:
Almedalen 2026 - onsdag 24 juni 9.30-10.15 
Finansbranschen i en ny världsordning – resiliens och anpassning i osäkra tider

Geopolitisk oro, klimatkris och snabb teknikutveckling formar en ny verklighet. Hur bygger finanssektorn motståndskraft för att möta osäkerheten? Hur bidrar en stabil finansbransch till ett mer resilient samhälle – och vilket ledarskap krävs när framtiden är svårläst?

  10.45-11.30 
Läkare räddar ju liv! Spelar vår naivitet de kriminella i händerna?

Kriminella aktörer bygger sin affär på en sårbar länk: förtroenderollen. I offentlig sektor och i det privata näringslivet lockas eller hotas människor att bli möjliggörare för olika typer av brottslighet. Hur skyddar vi oss mot fenomenet möjliggörare och hur kan vi stoppa otillåten påverkan?

  13.00-13.45 
Hur påverkar fördomar möjligheten att ta sig in på arbetsmarknaden – och vad kan vi göra åt det?

I ett panelsamtal lyfter vi insikter från en aktuell rapport och utforskar hur företag kan bredda rekryteringsbasen, stärka inkludering och skapa mer rättvisa vägar in på arbetsmarknaden. Deltagare från näringsliv, forskning och civilsamhälle diskutera vad som krävs för att vända utvecklingen.

  14.15-15.00 
När geopolitik blir kod: Cyberangrepp mot Norden i skuggan av ett nytt säkerhetsläge

Östersjön och Arktis har blivit centrala i stormaktsdynamiken. Nordisk energiproduktion, undervattenskablar och digital infrastruktur är strategiska mål. Statliga aktörer bedriver cyberoperationer i gråzonen – spionage, sabotageförberedelser och påverkanskampanjer. Hur bygger vi motståndskraft i system och samhälle?

  15.30-16.15 
Klimatrisker och framtidens kriser – hur rustar vi näringsliv och samhälle?

Resiliens är ett modeord inom näringslivet, men har klimatriskerna fått plats i beredskapsplanen? Klimatförändringar kan slå ut samhällsviktig verksamhet och sätta kritiska tjänster ur spel. Hur kan styrelser och ledningar förebygga effekterna av klimatrisker och bygga verklig resiliens?

  16.45-17.30 Ändrad momshantering – nya möjligheter för civilsamhället?
Civilsamhället pressas av regelverk och kostnader. En dom från Högsta förvaltningsdomstolen i maj i år kan förändra villkoren för samverkan – men räcker det, och vad krävs för att sektorn ska kunna växa och bidra ännu mer?

Läs mer här: https://www.pwc.se/sv/almedalen.html 9.30-10.15

videos.title: Trades, Trades, & More Trades | Morning Cuppa Hockey
videos.summary_source_text:
Trades, Trades, & More Trades | Morning Cuppa Hockey It's a jam-packed morning at Morning Cuppa Hockey as the NHL offseason kicks into high gear just days before the 2026 Draft in Buffalo! 

Andy Strickland joins Jonny and Colby to break down the blockbuster move sending Jordan Kyrou from St. Louis to Washington in exchange for Connor McMichael, Milton Gastrin and the 16th overall pick… what it means for the Blues' rebuild and what Kyrou brings to a Capitals squad with big aspirations.

Then Daily Faceoff's own Steven Ellis stops by with everything you need to know heading into the Draft… the prospects to watch, the teams with the most to gain and what to expect from a busy weekend in Buffalo.

Former NHLer Mike Commodore weighs in on one of the offseason's most polarizing storylines… Mike Babcock returning to Edmonton as head coach and what that hire says about the Oilers organization. 

Michael Russo of The Athletic closes things out with a look at why the Minnesota Wild have been so quiet to start the offseason and what moves… if any… could still be coming.

Don't miss a second of the daily hockey talk!

Hermes Lead Machine: 1-Click Lead Gen + Enriched Outreach Pipeline (Find, Verify, Score, Write, Send)

Julian demonstrates the experimental “Hermes Lead Machine,” a Hermes Agent workflow that generates and enriches leads in one click using the Hunter API. Users can either paste an existing list to enrich or describe the exact prospects they want in plain English (e.g., SEO agencies interested in link-building) and the system finds companies and people, captures domains and emails, enriches company details, verifies deliverability to reduce bounces, scores and filters leads (0–100) for fit, and segments them by status (new, enriched, valid, contacted, replied). It then writes personalized openers and outreach emails and can send through a dedicated inbox, all managed in a dashboard that feels like a SaaS tool. He contrasts this with manual, duct-taped outreach and explains setup via Agent OS/AppHub, API key, and email configuration, plus community support and coaching calls.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs

• Matches against tour players and creators

• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

• Bryson DeChambeau

• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: The Wildest Things I Saw Vibe Coded With Fable 5
videos.summary_source_text:
The Wildest Things I Saw Vibe Coded With Fable 5 I messed up. 

Everyone has been talking about the drama that went down around Claude Fable and Mythos getting shut down, including myself. But I got distracted from the REAL story here, which is just how crazy good these models were and the amazing things people were able to build with them.  

These are just a few examples, but it's insane that people built full scale projects and business ideas and NONE of them were engineers with massive dev budgets. They were just regular people with a good idea. 

What used to require a full development team and months of work now takes a single afternoon and a good AI model. We are watching in real time a massive shift in WHO gets to build things. 

But of course, the party was cut short because Anthropic was ordered to suspend foreign access to Fable 5 over security concerns, literally describing their own tech as "too powerful." 

And I get why that sounds terrifying. But look at what people actually did with it in the short window they had: they solved problems, built businesses, and created cool things to share with the world. That’s what happens when you put genuinely useful tech into the hands of the people. 

#Claude #Anthropic #AI #Entrepreneurship #vibecoding I messed up.

videos.title: Klimatrisker och framtidens kriser – hur rustar vi näringsliv och samhälle?
videos.summary_source_text: Klimatrisker och framtidens kriser – hur rustar vi näringsliv och samhälle? videos.title: Trying Harder Isn’t Helping Your Body Change
videos.summary_source_text:
Trying Harder Isn’t Helping Your Body Change Have you been trying hard to change your body, but still feel stuck?

Many people approach pain, tension, posture, and movement problems through more effort — more stretching, more strengthening, more correction, more discipline.

But sometimes trying harder is not what helps the body change.

Sometimes more effort creates more pressure, and the body responds by protecting even more.

In this video, I share why your body may not need more effort — it may need more permission. You’ll also experience a short somatic movement exploration to sense how less effort can create a very different experience.

If you’d like to explore this approach more deeply, try my free guided somatic movement session here: https://taro-iwamoto.thinkific.com/courses/masterclass

If you feel ready for deeper, more structured support, you can learn more about my course here:
https://taroiwamoto.com/thecourse

videos.title: Flavio Briatore: Growing Alpine with Colapinto, Gasly & Gucci | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Flavio Briatore: Growing Alpine with Colapinto, Gasly & Gucci | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast Flavio Briatore and ‘Team Enstone’ go back a long way.

As Benetton in the 90’s, he led them to multiple World Championships with Michael Schumacher, and as Renault in the 2000s, he did the same with Fernando Alonso. So how can he achieve similar success with Alpine?

Speaking to Tom Clarkson, Flavio talks about the progress the team have made since he became Executive Advisor, what he makes of his drivers Pierre Gasly and Franco Colapinto, and whether he has a timescale for Alpine to be fighting for titles.

Flavio also shares some funny anecdotes about replacing Jenson Button with Alonso at Renault, firing Jackie Stewart and his criticism of Franco in the latest series of Drive to Survive.

Plus, Flavio tells Tom about the arrival of Gucci as the team’s main sponsor in 2027.

Scott Hastings Joins the Show | Knicks Win It All, Giannis Traded & World Cup Buzz | After the Horn The New York Knicks are NBA Champions, and there's no shortage of storylines to break down on this episode of After the Horn.

The crew reacts to New York's championship run, discusses Jalen Brunson's rise to superstardom, and debates what comes next for the rest of the NBA. Giannis Antetokounmpo on the move to the Miami Heat , Plus, what should the Denver Nuggets do this offseason to get back into title contention?

The conversation also shifts to the FIFA World Cup, where Team USA has turned heads, Lionel Messi continues to shine, and Cristiano Ronaldo's future remains a major talking point.

videos.title: You Will NEVER Consume Seed Oils Again After Watching This
videos.summary_source_text:
You Will NEVER Consume Seed Oils Again After Watching This Are seed oils bad for your health? Discover the truth about seed oils, linoleic acid, omega-6 fats, and how changes in the modern diet may be affecting your heart, cellular health, and overall well-being.

0:00 Seed oils explained 
0:51 Linoleic acid
2:10 Oxidized oils 
3:15 What seed oils do to your body
3:55 Seed oil controversy
4:52 Seed oil dangers 
5:35 Cholesterol myths
7:10 Omega-6 fats and omega-3 fatty acids
8:12 Eliminating seed oils 

🌟 10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/3QEEnIP

Learn more about healthy fats, omega-3 fatty acids, and the hidden effects of modern cooking oils:
▶️ https://youtu.be/NOV5vIsjQhg
▶️ https://youtu.be/8iA49h1HpWA
▶️ https://youtu.be/oQ4--K5kWLQ

Read this article to learn which seed oils to avoid, and what to use instead: https://drbrg.co/4w5tDlZ

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Fat tissue is more than just stored energy; it’s living tissue built from the foods you eat. One of the primary fats found in seed oils is linoleic acid, an omega-6 fatty acid.

Over the past several decades, the amount of linoleic acid stored in the body has increased dramatically. Some researchers estimate that the average body fat contained about 6% linoleic acid in the 1960s, compared to roughly 18% today. Linoleic acid levels in breast milk have also increased significantly during the same period, while soybean oil consumption has risen substantially.

One concern with seed oils is that linoleic acid can oxidize when exposed to heat, especially during repeated heating and reheating. This process can create toxic byproducts that may negatively affect health.

Cholesterol is commonly used as a marker of cardiovascular health, but the body naturally produces cholesterol, and some researchers question whether it tells the whole story.
Another important consideration is the balance between omega-6 and omega-3 fatty acids. 

While a balanced intake is important, many people consume significantly more omega-6 fats than omega-3s.

To improve your omega fatty acid balance, focus on reducing highly processed seed oils and increasing omega-3-rich foods such as fatty fish, fish oil, and cod liver oil.

https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11849496/

https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC6860741/

videos.title: Stop Popping Up in Your Downswing
videos.summary_source_text:
Stop Popping Up in Your Downswing Click link in bio for lowest price on the Ball First Board. 
Most players don’t realize how weight shifts affect posture: when your weight drifts to your toes, you extend and pop up to avoid falling forward, and when it drifts to your heels, you naturally bend into posture to avoid falling backward. In the golf swing, many players lose posture in the downswing because they move toward their toes. I use the Ball First Board with an alignment stick behind me to create the feel of pushing my hips back, keeping pressure into the stick, and keeping my weight in the inside heels—especially through the transition. That heel-pressure and “rear end back” feel helps me stay in posture like the pros all the way to the finish. If you want a Ball First Board, check the link around the video or in my bio—stock is limited, and if it’s sold out, join the wait list. Click link in bio for lowest price on the Ball First Board.

videos.title: DRAFTING SEASON! Who Could the Carolina Hurricanes Take at 31st Overall?
videos.summary_source_text:
DRAFTING SEASON! Who Could the Carolina Hurricanes Take at 31st Overall? As we get closer to the 2026 NHL Entry Draft, the Carolina Hurricanes have the 31st overall pick. While most of the time they trade out of the first round to get more draft capital, what if they kept the pick? That said, if they do, who do they take at 31? On Tuesday, we talked about Tommy Bleyl; who else could be solid at 31? On the Wednesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on why center Maddox Dagenais of the Québec Remparts might be a solid option at 31. What did he do in 2025-26 that put himself into a good spot to get picked in the later part of Round 1? What could he bring to the Hurricanes? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on how JP Hurlbert of the Kamloops Blazers is a good option as well. What does the right winger bring to the organization that has a good amount of top wingers already? Finally, there were a plethora of trades in the NHL on June 23. What does it mean for the Hurricanes as the league is trading people away more than we saw at the trade deadline in March? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

What wedge grinds do YOU need 🤔 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: Understand and learn the circle of speed, part 2: Easy drills.
videos.channel: Better & Easier golf with your guide Marcus Edblad
videos.summary_source_text:
Understand and learn the circle of speed, part 2: Easy drills. Two easy drills to feel the proper path of the club and easily see if we do it correct or wrong. #golfswing #golf #golftips 

0:00 Intro to how to understand and learn the circle of speed

Online lesson are now a possibility on Skillest: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

Let me help you get an effortless golfswing with speed, distance and accuracy. I call it the circle of speed. A good release will help you to a better impact and longer drives and irons without slice and hook. How to swing a golf club need to be adjusted to your skill level and experience. 

Long and straight is the goal for everyone but it takes time. Try to focus on one thing not everything when you practise. Impact, face control and swingpath will always be the most important part to drill. We focus too much on rotation but no good golf shot will be executed just by rotating. 

We also need to understand that many myths in golf are misleading. Everything that you find on the internet isn’t true. Ben Hogan, Sam Snead are two of the legends that are often misunderstood.  To understand golf we need to take it step by step and learn every part of the swing before we move on to the next. It's like a big jigsaw puzzle that we all can figure out. 

A will never call a slice sexy but a high draw is beautiful in a very special way. Some pro's that hit draw: Rory McIroy, Xander Schauffele, Patrick Reed, Sepp Straka, Bryson Dechambeau  and many, many more. 

We shall not keep our head still, only start with the hips, look only at the ball or keep the left or right arm straight. Understand what do do with the club and let your body find the best way possible. 

This is not Rick Shiels, Saguto golf, Danny Maude, Meandmygolf, the Average Golfer, Malaska, Mark Crossfield, Alex Elliot Golf or Paige Spiranac. This is a method that anyone can learn if you give it a chance. 

If you use callaway, ping, titleist, takomo or taylor made clubs doesn’t matter you can learn to hit good golf shots. Your loft or your shaft on the club will not change but you can always get better. 

Find what inspires you. Golf basics are the same for everyone. The pga tour, longdrivers or other good golfers can all help you find better golf shots. Watch what they do instead of listed to what they say. Listen mostly to your body and figure out what you need to do to produce the same results as the pros on TV. Be careful when you watch a golf swing in slow motion. The result isn't always what the golfer is trying to do. Feel and real are seldom the same. 

We can find inspiration in a lot of things. You can find training motivation watching movies like Rocky, Tin Cup or Happy Gilmore and find mental inspiration in legends like Arnold Schwarzenegger, Hulk Hogan, Sylvester Stallone or Mike Tyson. Maybe we sometimes need to hear about crazy achievements from people like David Goggins, Jocko Willink, Ct Fletcher, Jim Rohn or Tony Robbins. 

Mike Malaska, Mike Austin, Mike Dunaway, Pete Cowen and Steve Pratt are some of my favorite golf instructors online. Find the tips that make your golf better. Decide what you want to hit. I teach a draw but many like a fade and nobody likes a hook or slice. 

Your hips or your lag is not the key to golf. Your hands will decide the shot and you can do like Tiger Woods and trust your hands. Teach your hands to hit different shots. Hit big hooks and slices to understand what happens. Only straight is not gonna teach you anything. 

Bryson Dechambeu and Kyle Birkshire can inspire you to hit it longer. Tiger Woods and Phil Mickelson can give you inspiration and motivation to test new things and new golf shots. Linn Grant, Viktor Hovland and Ludvig Aberg can show you the future of golf. 

The Masters, Players Championship, The Players, The Open and US Open can make you love golf even more. See the best in the world solve all the problems we all need to master any golf course. Golf is a craft and you need fantasy, feel and skills to master it.

Questions my videos will answer:

How to swing faster. How to hit longer. How to swing faster. How to hit your irons better. How to be better at anything. How to master the circle of speed. How to get a better short game. How to hit your wedge better. How to release the golf club. How to rotate in golf. Best tips for beginner golfers. How to hit down on the ball. How to hit up on the ball. How to rotate hips in the golf swing. How to hit straight every time. How to stop slicing. How to swing effortlessly. 

#subscribe #golftips #pga  #hurricane 


Filmed with Iphone 15 pro or Iphone 17 Two easy drills to feel the proper path of the club and easily see if we do it correct or wrong. #golfswing #golf #golftips 

0:00 Intro to how to understand and learn the circle of speed

Online lesson are now a possibility on Skillest: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

Let me help you get an effortless golfswing with speed, distance and accuracy. I call it the circle of speed. A good release will help you to a better impact and longer drives and irons without slice and hook. How to swing a golf club need to be adjusted to your skill level and experience. 

Long and straight is the goal for everyone but it takes time. Try to focus on one thing not everything when you practise. Impact, face control and swingpath will always be the most important part to drill. We focus too much on rotation but no good golf shot will be executed just by rotating. 

We also need to understand that many myths in golf are misleading. Everything that you find on the internet isn’t true. Ben Hogan, Sam Snead are two of the legends that are often misunderstood.  To understand golf we need to take it step by step and learn every part of the swing before we move on to the next. It's like a big jigsaw puzzle that we all can figure out. 

A will never call a slice sexy but a high draw is beautiful in a very special way. Some pro's that hit draw: Rory McIroy, Xander Schauffele, Patrick Reed, Sepp Straka, Bryson Dechambeau  and many, many more. 

We shall not keep our head still, only start with the hips, look only at the ball or keep the left or right arm straight. Understand what do do with the club and let your body find the best way possible. 

This is not Rick Shiels, Saguto golf, Danny Maude, Meandmygolf, the Average Golfer, Malaska, Mark Crossfield, Alex Elliot Golf or Paige Spiranac. This is a method that anyone can learn if you give it a chance. 

If you use callaway, ping, titleist, takomo or taylor made clubs doesn’t matter you can learn to hit good golf shots. Your loft or your shaft on the club will not change but you can always get better. 

Find what inspires you. Golf basics are the same for everyone. The pga tour, longdrivers or other good golfers can all help you find better golf shots. Watch what they do instead of listed to what they say. Listen mostly to your body and figure out what you need to do to produce the same results as the pros on TV. Be careful when you watch a golf swing in slow motion. The result isn't always what the golfer is trying to do. Feel and real are seldom the same. 

We can find inspiration in a lot of things. You can find training motivation watching movies like Rocky, Tin Cup or Happy Gilmore and find mental inspiration in legends like Arnold Schwarzenegger, Hulk Hogan, Sylvester Stallone or Mike Tyson. Maybe we sometimes need to hear about crazy achievements from people like David Goggins, Jocko Willink, Ct Fletcher, Jim Rohn or Tony Robbins. 

Mike Malaska, Mike Austin, Mike Dunaway, Pete Cowen and Steve Pratt are some of my favorite golf instructors online. Find the tips that make your golf better. Decide what you want to hit. I teach a draw but many like a fade and nobody likes a hook or slice. 

Your hips or your lag is not the key to golf. Your hands will decide the shot and you can do like Tiger Woods and trust your hands. Teach your hands to hit different shots. Hit big hooks and slices to understand what happens. Only straight is not gonna teach you anything. 

Bryson Dechambeu and Kyle Birkshire can inspire you to hit it longer. Tiger Woods and Phil Mickelson can give you inspiration and motivation to test new things and new golf shots. Linn Grant, Viktor Hovland and Ludvig Aberg can show you the future of golf. 

The Masters, Players Championship, The Players, The Open and US Open can make you love golf even more. See the best in the world solve all the problems we all need to master any golf course. Golf is a craft and you need fantasy, feel and skills to master it.

Questions my videos will answer:

How to swing faster. How to hit longer. How to swing faster. How to hit your irons better. How to be better at anything. How to master the circle of speed. How to get a better short game. How to hit your wedge better. How to release the golf club. How to rotate in golf. Best tips for beginner golfers. How to hit down on the ball. How to hit up on the ball. How to rotate hips in the golf swing. How to hit straight every time. How to stop slicing. How to swing effortlessly. 

#subscribe #golftips #pga  #hurricane 


Filmed with Iphone 15 pro or Iphone 17

videos.title: Lambo Huracan Perf v Zeekr 8X: DRAG RACE
videos.summary_source_text:
Lambo Huracan Perf v Zeekr 8X: DRAG RACE We’re drag racing the Chinese Zeekr 8X against a Lamborghini Huracan Performante over the 1/4-mile and 1/2 mile. We’ll also test the two against each other in a brake test from 100mph.

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-160626

It’s time for a China vs Italy drag race! 

We’ve got our hands on the Zeekr 8X SUV, and it’s going up against the infamous Lamborghini Huracan Performante! 

The question is, can an SUV really come close to beating a sports car over the 1/4-mile?! Let’s take a closer look at the stats. 

Starting with the Lamborghini, it’s powered by a 5.2-litre naturally-aspirated V10 that delivers 640hp and 600Nn. This power is sent to all four wheels via a dual-clutch automatic gearbox, and it weighs in at just 1482kg. As of today, it’s worth around £180,000. 

Then we come to the Zeekr. Under the bonnet sits a 2-litre turbocharged petrol engine… But this is used to power three electric motors! These combine to produce an incredible 1,400hp and 1,410Nm, with this power sent to all four wheels. It’s incredibly heavy, though, tipping the scales at 2,820kg! However, it’s much cheaper than the Lambo, costing just £54,300!

So the Zeekr is well up on power, but will the huge weight difference prove decisive? There’s only one way to find out for sure… LET’S RACE!

My OpenClaw agent decided it needs more compute. So I gave it a budget and let it shop for itself. In this video I'll show you how I built an AI agent that hunts eBay for Mac Mini deals using GStack (Garry Tan's open source Claude Code framework) and the Zapier SDK as the action layer. videos.title: Lär dig förstå den magiska cirkeln, del2/3: Enkla övningar.
videos.channel: Bättre & Enklare golf med Marcus Edblad PGA
videos.summary_source_text:
Lär dig förstå den magiska cirkeln, del2/3: Enkla övningar. Övningarna berättar om du gör rätt eller fel. Dessa övningar kan alla göra för att svinga inifrån och ut. #golf #golftips #golfswing 

0:00 Intro till lär dig den magiska cirkeln från grunden. 

Nu finns det möjlighet att genom appen Skillest göra mig till din personliga tränare. Du hittar mig på denna länk: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

Låt mig hjälpa dig finna bättre slag, bollträff, riktning och svinghastighet. Oavsett om du slår en wedge, järnklubba eller driver kan du med dina händer lära dig golfslag som du inte trodde var möjliga. Längre och rakare slag kräver alltid träning men något alla kan lära sig.  

Vare sig du fightas med en slice eller en hook så har jag videos som kan guida till bättre golf. Är du nybörjare så kan du börja med min grönt kort eller nybörjarkurs.

Försök ersätta dåliga vanor med nya bättre vanor. Oavsett vilket loft eller skaft din klubba har så är det du som bestämmer vad som ska hända. Oavsett om det står callaway, ping, titleist eller taylor made på klubban så kan du slå bra slag.

Var noga med vad du tittar på. Det finns många duktiga instruktörer på nätet, några av mina favoriter är Mike Malaska, Mike Dunaway, Mike Austin.

Försök fokusera på grunderna i slaget bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår. Träna med fördel på en sak i taget. Tränar du din svinghastighet måste du tillåta att det går snett och tränar du raka slag kan du inte samtidigt svinga i max fart.

Ha tålamod och låt det ta sin tid, luras inte av genvägar som bara gör att du tappar fokus från det viktiga. Golf kommer alltid vara svårt men vi kan med träning se till att vi blir bättre för varje dag som går.

Titta mycket på golf på TV. Bryson Dechambeu, Dustin Johnson, Rory Mcilroy kan inspirera till längre slag och andra som Tiger Woods, Viktor Hovland, Ludvig Åberg och Phil Mickelson kan ge dig fantasi att skapa nya slag.

Träna styrketräning för hela kroppen för att må bra genom livet och skapa en effektiv maskin. Träna händer, handleder och armar för att skapa en effektiv release och mer svinghastighet.

Du kan finna inspiration i filmer som Happy Gilmore, Tin Cup eller Bagger Vance. Filmer som Rocky kan ge dig motivation att ta dig till gymet. Legender som Arnold Schwarzenegger, Sylvester Stallone eller Hulk Hogan kan få dig att vilja bli starkare och Moe Norman, Arnold Palmer, Ben Hogan, Sam Snead eller Jack Nicklaus kan inspirera dig att bli en bättre golfare. 

Ge aldrig upp i sökandet och träningen för att få bästa bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår.

Filmat med iPhone 17 och redigerat i iMovie på en Macbook. Övningarna berättar om du gör rätt eller fel. Dessa övningar kan alla göra för att svinga inifrån och ut. #golf #golftips #golfswing

Vare sig du fightas med en slice eller en hook så har jag videos som kan guida till bättre golf. Är du nybörjare så kan du börja med min grönt kort eller nybörjarkurs.

Försök ersätta dåliga vanor med nya bättre vanor. Oavsett vilket loft eller skaft din klubba har så är det du som bestämmer vad som ska hända. Oavsett om det står callaway, ping, titleist eller taylor made på klubban så kan du slå bra slag.

Var noga med vad du tittar på. Det finns många duktiga instruktörer på nätet, några av mina favoriter är Mike Malaska, Mike Dunaway, Mike Austin.

Försök fokusera på grunderna i slaget bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår. Träna med fördel på en sak i taget. Tränar du din svinghastighet måste du tillåta att det går snett och tränar du raka slag kan du inte samtidigt svinga i max fart.

Ha tålamod och låt det ta sin tid, luras inte av genvägar som bara gör att du tappar fokus från det viktiga. Golf kommer alltid vara svårt men vi kan med träning se till att vi blir bättre för varje dag som går.

Titta mycket på golf på TV. Bryson Dechambeu, Dustin Johnson, Rory Mcilroy kan inspirera till längre slag och andra som Tiger Woods, Viktor Hovland, Ludvig Åberg och Phil Mickelson kan ge dig fantasi att skapa nya slag.

Träna styrketräning för hela kroppen för att må bra genom livet och skapa en effektiv maskin. Träna händer, handleder och armar för att skapa en effektiv release och mer svinghastighet.

Du kan finna inspiration i filmer som Happy Gilmore, Tin Cup eller Bagger Vance. Filmer som Rocky kan ge dig motivation att ta dig till gymet. Legender som Arnold Schwarzenegger, Sylvester Stallone eller Hulk Hogan kan få dig att vilja bli starkare och Moe Norman, Arnold Palmer, Ben Hogan, Sam Snead eller Jack Nicklaus kan inspirera dig att bli en bättre golfare. 

Ge aldrig upp i sökandet och träningen för att få bästa bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår.

Filmat med iPhone 17 och redigerat i iMovie på en Macbook.
videos.summary: Lär dig förstå den magiska cirkeln, del2/3: Enkla övningar. Övningarna berättar om du gör rätt eller fel.

videos.title: DALLAS MAVERICKS PICK MOREZ JOHNSON 9TH, TRADE FOR SERGIO DE LARREA IN NBA DRAFT | DLLS Mavs Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
DALLAS MAVERICKS PICK MOREZ JOHNSON 9TH, TRADE FOR SERGIO DE LARREA IN NBA DRAFT | DLLS Mavs Podcast Become a DIEHARD! alldlls.com/diehard

Join the DLLS Mavs crew live as they react to each and every pick during the first round of the 2026 NBA Draft! We dive in to the Mavericks' selection of Michigan big man Morez Johnson Jr. at no. 9- how do we feel about the pick? Was it a reach or a deserving spot? How does he fit with Cooper Flagg? We discuss it all. Then, experience with us the confusion of what the Mavs were doing at the end of the first round- only to be pleasantly surprised when we learn Dallas ended up with Sergio De Larrea. We discuss the young Spaniard's game and why this seems like a fitting Masai Ujiri/Mike Schmitz pick. And finally, Marc Stein joins the show as we recap the Mavericks' night!

videos.title: I Let AI Agents Control My Home Assistant
videos.summary_source_text:
I Let AI Agents Control My Home Assistant 🧱 Join the AI Agent & Automation Builders community: https://mrc.fm/cmc

I gave AI coding agents the keys to my house. This is what happened.

In this video I wire up AI agents to Home Assistant so they can read my sensors, flip my lights, and run real automations on command. No clicking through menus. I just tell an agent what I want and it writes the logic, calls the right services, and makes it happen.

I walk through the full setup. How I connect the agent to Home Assistant, how I stop it doing anything daft, and the guardrails I added after a few things went sideways. I show the wins and the bits that broke, because that is always the interesting part.

By the end you will see exactly how to let an AI agent control your smart home, what it is brilliant at, and where you still want a human in the loop.

If you build with AI agents and automation, come and join us. We run weekly Build Clinics and share everything we make.

videos.title: The Avalanche Are Quiet On a Crazy Day of Trades. Will That Change?
videos.summary_source_text:
The Avalanche Are Quiet On a Crazy Day of Trades. Will That Change? NHL trade frenzy shakes the league as major names switch teams—except for the Colorado Avalanche, who remain silent amidst the chaos. Blockbuster deals send Bowen Byram and Jordan Greenway to the Chicago Blackhawks for a coveted No. 4 overall pick, while Jordan Kyrou heads to the Washington Capitals, and William Eklund moves to the Ottawa Senators in a strategic exchange. How will these moves reshape the Central Division, and do the Avalanche risk falling behind as rivals bolster their rosters?

Host Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down each major trade, debate potential next moves for the Avalanche—specifically the future of Valeri Nichushkin—and assess if Joe Sakic can leverage the market’s wild pricing for a late splash. Analysis also spotlights Josh Manson’s breakout season and what his strong performance means for Colorado’s blue line. Will the Avs shake up their strategy or stick to their guns as the draft approaches?

 Credit: Brian Fluharty-Imagn Images
