videos.title: Claude 5's Return: What Anthropic Isn't Saying in Seoul
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude 5's Return: What Anthropic Isn't Saying in Seoul Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Anthropic shipped the most capable model it had ever built — and three days later the US government forced it offline for the entire planet, with about 90 minutes of warning. No hype, no vendor spin taken at face value. Here's what "Claude 5" actually is (starting with the fact that it isn't called Claude 5), what it could do, why Commerce pulled it, and whether you'll ever get to use it.

We separate what's verified from what's still a vendor claim: the 1M-token context window, "adaptive thinking," the Stripe migration anecdote, the analytics benchmark numbers, and the export-control directive that took Fable 5 and Mythos 5 dark. Then we get into the real fight underneath it all — not the benchmarks, but governance.

⏱️ Chapters
00:00  Intro: The Fastest Launch Reversal I've Seen
01:08  The Launch and the Shutdown
04:09  What Claude 5 Actually Is (Features & Architecture)
07:13  What It Could Do: Capabilities and Use Cases
09:46  The Risks, and the Part Washington Cared About
12:11  How It Stacks Up Against the Competition
14:04  Roadmap, and What Happens Next

Where's YOUR line between AI safety and regulatory overreach? Drop it in the comments — I read them before planning the next deep dive.

👉 Subscribe for breakdowns that take the policy as seriously as the tech.

videos.title: Starting Hockey at 17 | The Train 2.0 Show
videos.summary_source_text:
Starting Hockey at 17 | The Train 2.0 Show Starting Hockey at 17 | The Train 2.0 Show

If you measure how long NHL players actually spend in their forward stride during a shift, it's around 10% of their ice time. Yet most hockey camps and skill development programs spend 50% of every session drilling stride mechanics in a straight line. That math alone explains a huge chunk of why traditional power skating drills don't translate to a real game.

In this episode of the Train 2.0 Show, Kevin McKinnon sits down with Colton Keller, a Buffalo coach who picked up hockey late in his teens and used Train 2.0 to accelerate his own development before founding Train 2.0 Buffalo. They get into the specific skills the modern NHL is built on that almost nobody is training, the drills players are still wasting ice time on, and what the next generation development model should actually look like.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

videos.title: Fenix-Saaben provkörd!
videos.summary_source_text:
Fenix-Saaben provkörd! Del 5 av serien filmer om Saab-Fenix 9-3 som tyvärr inte kom i serieproduktion.
Det är äntligen dags att provköra chassit och drivlinan som skulle ha funnits i Saab 9-3-generationen som aldrig kom i produktion.
Tyvärr var inte givaren till styrservot inkopplat och hjulinställning var inte heller gjord – så bilen kommer vara bättre att köra än vad den var i denna film. Återkommer med en ny provkörning längre fram!

Anders Johansson som driver Griffin Cars med Gabriel Palmenäs,  berättar också om Saab-tiden och hur nedläggningen av Saab påverkade Trollhättan. 

Bakgrund:
Efterföljaren till den sista generationen Saab 9-3 hade kommit mycket långt, när Saab gick i konkurs. Projekt 540, eller Phoenix/Fenix,  hade bland annat en ny avancerad bak- och framvagn, ny drivlina och även en elbakaxel på gång.
Anders Johansson och Gabriel Palmenäs (som givetvis jobbade på Saab när det begav sig) driver företaget Griffin Cars, och har köpt upp ett restlager av axlar och motorer för att modernisera befintliga Saab 9-3 bilar.
Men den stora planen är att bygga en liten serie moderna bilar, med äkta Saabteknik! (Det återkommer vi till längre fram)
I en serie intervjuer med Saab-folk som var med och utvecklade Fenixplattformen, ska vi tala teknik, men givetvis också provköra en av de uppdaterade bilarna.
I filmerna:
Del 1: bakgrund och framtidsversion
Del 2: Chassit – Gunnar Olsson
och Per Janssson
Del 3: Elbakaxel, Stefan Barbunopulos
Del 4: Motor, Peter Dahl
Del 5: Provkörning!
Del 6: Intervju med designern Jason Castriota

Se till att prenumerera så du inte missar något!

Bli gärna medlem och stöd kanalen, som blir reklamfri! 29 kr/månad
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCU-4UJDGqQWK5Iv4wXDlzGQ/join

videos.title: Why Stillness Hurts Your Swing  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Stillness Hurts Your Swing  #golfswing #golftips A stable golf swing does not mean a still golf swing. When golfers try to keep the lower body frozen, they block rotation, lose their pivot, and often come over the top in the downswing. In this video, we show how to keep your feet grounded and stable while allowing the hips to move freely in the backswing. The result is a more athletic, dynamic motion that creates better rotation and cleaner contact.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. A stable golf swing does not mean a still golf swing. videos.title: What's REALLY Keeping Your Blood Pressure High (& How to Fix It)
videos.summary_source_text:
What's REALLY Keeping Your Blood Pressure High (& How to Fix It) Your blood pressure medication may be lowering one of the very nutrients needed to support healthy blood pressure. Discover what causes high blood pressure and why your blood pressure won’t go down, despite treatment.
  
0:00 Why your high blood pressure won’t go down
0:20 Thiazide diuretics and magnesium depletion 
1:48 Calcium channel blockers 
2:16 Magnesium and potassium 
4:12 Vitamin D deficiency and hypertension 
5:27 What causes high blood pressure?
7:56 Sodium and high blood pressure 
8:53 How to lower blood pressure 

This video is for educational purposes only, not medical advice. Do not start, stop, or change medication without your physician.

🌟10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4xBlO9n

Keep watching to learn more about the key minerals that affect your blood pressure:
▶️ https://youtu.be/Qgwu_-6wy40
▶️ https://youtu.be/2qu59nPJXcg
▶️ https://youtu.be/9dDJY6MLWhk

Check out this article for 7 tips to lower blood pressure naturally: https://drbrg.co/4xGeGs4

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Thiazide diuretics are the most commonly prescribed blood pressure medications and are taken by more than 40 million people. While they help remove excess sodium, they can also deplete magnesium, an essential mineral involved in blood pressure control.

Without enough magnesium, calcium can build up inside the arteries, causing them to become more constricted. This is why calcium channel blockers are commonly used for high blood pressure. Magnesium acts as a natural calcium channel blocker and natural beta blocker. 

Many diuretics for high blood pressure can also deplete potassium. Potassium and magnesium work together to help keep the arteries relaxed, yet deficiencies in both nutrients are very common. Potassium also depends on adequate magnesium to function properly.

Vitamin D deficiency may also contribute to hypertension, and vitamin D relies on magnesium for proper activation and function.

High blood pressure is often viewed as a sodium problem, but focusing solely on reducing sodium intake may overlook other important factors and cause other problems. Addressing potassium and magnesium deficiencies could be a better way of supporting healthy blood pressure levels.

DATA:
https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2161831322011279
https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0270929506001434 
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC6695889/

Down to the Wire at Royal Liverpool 🔥 | Amateur Championship Final Highlights SUBSCRIBE -  https://bit.ly/RandaGolfSubscribe

The 131st Amateur Championship came to a dramatic conclusion at Royal Liverpool as two players battled over 36 holes for one of the most prestigious titles in amateur golf.

Watch the best moments from a gripping final that had momentum swings, clutch shots and plenty of drama before a champion was crowned.

The Amateur Championship is one of the leading events in world amateur golf and offers the champion exemptions into The Open, the U.S. Open and, by tradition, an invitation to compete at the Masters Tournament.

videos.title: Vi hittade Hawaiis mest osannolika burgare – på en vulkan
videos.summary_source_text:
Vi hittade Hawaiis mest osannolika burgare – på en vulkan 📖 Köp vår bok: https://www.adlibris.com/sv/bok/burgare-sa-gor-du-varldens-basta-burgare-hemma-9789127191211

Aloha burger ohana! 🌺🍔

Vi är tillbaka på Hawaii!
Förra året tog Selin ett rejält grepp om Oahu och jagade öns bästa burgare. Den här gången är det Tobys tur att återvända till paradiset – och destinationen är Maui. Från kust till berg, från strandhäng till vulkanlandskap, letar vi efter de burgare som verkligen är värda en omväg.

Resan tar oss till en klassisk foodtruck-arena nära flygplatsen i Kahului, vidare till soliga Kihei vid havet och ända upp till Hawaiis berömda upcountry-region, halvvägs upp för den mäktiga vulkanen Haleakalā. Dessutom gör vi ett stopp på Oahu för att testa en omtalad burgare strax utanför Waikiki och Honolulu.

Men Hawaii handlar om mycket mer än hamburgare. Längs vägen visar vi också några av våra favoriter från det hawaiianska köket – färsk poke, iskall shave ice, nyfriterade malasadas och andra lokala specialiteter som gör öarna till ett paradis för matälskare.

Vilken burgare blir bäst på Maui? Och är någon av dem värd en plats bland Hawaiis absoluta toppburgare?

A hui hou! Mahalo för att du tittar! 🤙

Här är fullständiga recensioner för alla burgarna vi recenserar i dagens avsnitt:

videos.title: This Is The First Real Shape Of AGI: Fusion Agents
videos.summary_source_text:
This Is The First Real Shape Of AGI: Fusion Agents This may be the first real shape of AGI. Fable showed what deep AI reasoning could feel like, but now the bigger system is starting to appear. Apps in AI agents can build interactive tools, dashboards, diagrams, 3D models, and deployed services from a single prompt. Fusion Agents can split complex work across multiple AI workers and fuse the results into one finished output. Together, they show how AI is moving from smart answers to real execution.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@space.revolution

📌 What You’ll See:
Apps in AI agents creating interactive apps, dashboards, diagrams, and research tools
SOURCE: https://chatllm.abacus.ai/

AI agents that can build, edit, preview, and deploy full-stack apps
SOURCE: https://abacus.ai/help/chatllm-ai-super-assistant/deepagent-apps

Multi-agent workflows reviewing PRs in parallel, finding bugs, applying fixes, and creating new PRs
SOURCE: https://deepagent.abacus.ai/

🚨 Why It Matters
This is bigger than another model launch. Fable showed the reasoning layer, but these new systems show the working layer around it. AI can now create tools, coordinate agents, connect to real platforms, deploy services, and deliver usable outputs. That is why this looks less like another chatbot upgrade and more like the first real shape of AGI.

videos.title: How Is The Modern NHL Shot Similar To Tennis?
videos.summary_source_text:
How Is The Modern NHL Shot Similar To Tennis? The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.summary_source_text:
Do You Need More Width?  #golfswing #golftips We need width in the backswing to get away from that nasty slice pattern.
Everyone's range of motion and backswing will look different - focus on getting your hands farther away from your chest at the top of your backswing and go from there.

videos.summary_source_text:
9 Grok Features You're Not Using (And the One Habit That Saves You) Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Most people open Grok, type a question like it's Google, and close the tab — using maybe 10% of what it can do. This is the plain-English tour of the other 90%: every tool Grok puts in front of you, what each one is actually for, and the small habits that get you far better results. No coding, no jargon.

We cover the personality switch, Grok's headline real-time X and web search, DeepSearch for research, Think mode for hard problems, voice and camera mode, Aurora image generation, Grok Imagine video, uploading your own files, and Companions — plus an honest look at Grok's weakness with citations and how to work around it.

By the end you'll know exactly which button to press for which job.

videos.summary_source_text:
🔴 LIVE | The Amateur Championship Golf | FINAL SUBSCRIBE -  https://bit.ly/RandaGolfSubscribe

This year a world-class field featuring golfers from 41 countries will gather at Royal Liverpool and West Lancashire from 15 to 20 June.

This represents the Championship's record 19th staging at Hoylake, with 288 players competing for one of the top titles in amateur golf and to follow in the footsteps of past champions including Bobby Jones, José María Olazábal, Sergio Garcia and Matteo Manassero.

Contested over stroke play and then match play, the winner will earn exemptions into The Open, the US Open, a DP World Tour event and, by tradition, an invitation to compete in the Masters Tournament provided they retain their amateur status.

videos.title: What Fiber Is Really Feeding
videos.summary_source_text:
What Fiber Is Really Feeding Most people think they're only eating for themselves. In reality, every meal is also feeding trillions of bacteria living in the gut. Different types of fiber nourish different species of beneficial bacteria, helping create a more diverse and resilient microbiome. Over time, those choices can influence which bacteria thrive and which ones disappear. Every meal is an opportunity to support the microbes that support us.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

Subscribe to the Channel! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOtQHehGWtblMp1gZC8Kq3Q?sub_confirmation=1

Remember that my videos are not a substitute for individualized medical care by a qualified physician. Always consult your physicians before making any diet, nutrition, medication, or lifestyle changes.


About Dr. Pradip Jamnadas, MD, MBBS, FACC, FSCAI, FCCP, FACP

The founder and Chief Medical Officer of Cardiovascular Interventions, P.A. in Orlando Florida where, since 1990,  he has been repeatedly recognized in local publications as a Top Doctor performing thousands of interventional procedures in hospital and out patient settings. As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease . He is also a clinical assistant professor of medicine at The Florida State University and University of Central Florida. Most people think they're only eating for themselves. videos.title: Rick Shiels Settles Golf's Biggest Equipment Debates
videos.summary_source_text:
Rick Shiels Settles Golf's Biggest Equipment Debates The H.I.T Golf Q&A is back! Rick Shiels and Guy tackle your biggest equipment questions, settles some golf debates, and shares his honest opinions on clubs, fittings, shafts and more.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

Official Partners

https://golf.ecco.com

videos.title: GPT-6 Release Date: The Honest, Evidence-Based Answer Nobody Posts
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT-6 Release Date: The Honest, Evidence-Based Answer Nobody Posts Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Three videos this week told you exactly when GPT-6 drops — and gave you three different dates. So I did the boring part: read OpenAI's docs, the system cards, and the one leak worth trusting. 
The result messes with the hype cycle, because OpenAI hasn't announced GPT-6 at all — and the most credible report says the next model isn't even called GPT-6.
This video separates what's confirmed from what's confident guessing, and gives you a probability-weighted timeline with actual confidence levels attached.

We start with the ground truth most videos skip — the current flagship is GPT-5.5, not GPT-6 — then read what GPT-5.5's specs, pricing, and benchmarks are quietly telling us about where the frontier actually is. We cover the only leak worth taking seriously (the reported "5.6" model), why GPT-6 is most plausibly a system-level release rather than a benchmark release, where it should actually improve, and the unpopular prediction that GPT-6 may arrive more constrained than enthusiasts expect, not less. We close with a timeline that puts a confidence level on every claim instead of a clickbait date.
Evidence over hype is the entire point of this channel. If that's your thing, subscribe.

💬 Team "GPT-6 in 2026" or team "early 2027"? Make your case in the comments — bring receipts, not vibes.

videos.summary_source_text:
The MOST Dangerous Sign of Type 2 Diabetes The most dangerous sign of type 2 diabetes isn't frequent urination or excessive thirst. The real danger is that insulin resistance can develop silently for years, often decades, before obvious symptoms appear.

🌟 10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4ga0Yr0

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

One of the best ways to identify potential problems early is through a fasting insulin test, which may reveal insulin resistance long before blood sugar levels become abnormal. Unfortunately, this test isn't always included in routine screenings.

Small daily habits can have a powerful impact on your long-term health. The earlier you take action, the easier it is to prevent metabolic problems before they become serious.

Dr. Eric Berg, DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the author of the best-selling book "The Healthy Keto Plan" and is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals. He no longer practices but focuses on health education through social media.

videos.title: This New Technique Makes Hybrids and Long Irons So Easy
videos.summary_source_text:
This New Technique Makes Hybrids and Long Irons So Easy Most senior golfers think they struggle with hybrids and long irons because they don’t have enough speed…but what if the real reason is where their body is moving in the golf swing?

In this golf lesson, Danny Maude shares a simple hybrid and long iron drill that can help senior golfers strike the ball first, stop hitting fat shots, get the ball launching higher, and create more effortless distance from the fairway.

After sharing the “wrench drill” for driver last week, so many golfers asked whether the same feeling works with hybrids, long irons and fairway shots. The answer is yes — and in many ways, this drill is even more useful when the ball is on the ground.

If you struggle to hit hybrids from the fairway, catch the ground before the ball, thin your long irons, lose height, or feel like you can’t reach greens in two anymore, this simple golf drill could really help.

In this video, you’ll learn:

▪️Why senior golfers struggle to hit hybrids and long irons
▪️Why poor contact often comes from moving too far off the ball
▪️How to strike the ball first with hybrids and long irons
▪️The simple “wrench drill” for better fairway shots
▪️How to use your lead side as a pivot point
▪️Why keeping more weight forward can improve your golf swing and ball striking
▪️How to stop hitting fat shots with hybrids
▪️How to create effortless distance without hurting your back
▪️Why the golf club needs to trail your body for more power
▪️How to transfer the drill back into your normal golf swing

⏱️ Chapters:

00:00 Does the wrench drill work with hybrids and long irons?
00:20 How senior golfers can create effortless yards
00:42 How to swing longer without hurting your back
00:54 Free practice guide and subscribe
01:06 Why distance matters for lowering scores
01:31 What is the wrench drill?
01:50 Why hybrids need ball-first contact
02:09 Why inconsistent strike happens
02:37 Why the lower body needs to lead
02:58 How to set up the wrench drill
03:20 Why more weight forward improves strike
03:40 How to use the trail foot as a prop

videos.title: Anti Shank Drill   #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Anti Shank Drill   #golfswing #golftips This range drill is perfect if you struggle with early extension or keep finding the hosel with your irons. By setting up with the ball off the heel and swinging to miss it on the inside, you learn how to keep the club working on a better path. Then, using the same setup, striking the ball off the toe trains you to return the club to the center of the face. This helps you find the sweet spot again and produces much cleaner contact.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. This range drill is perfect if you struggle with early extension or keep finding the hosel with your irons. By setting up with the ball off the heel and swinging to miss it on the inside, you learn how to keep the club working on a better path. Then, using the same setup, striking the ball off the toe trains you to return the club to the center of the face. This helps you find the sweet spot again and produces much cleaner contact.

videos.title: What 5 Days Without Food Does To Your Body (Day 3 is Incredible)
videos.summary_source_text:
What 5 Days Without Food Does To Your Body (Day 3 is Incredible) What happens to your body during a 5-day fast? Discover the benefits of fasting day by day, how to activate autophagy, support cellular repair and cleanup, plus fasting tips for maximum results. 

0:00 Fasting day by day 
1:03 mTOR fasting 
1:57 Fasting day 1 
2:26 Sodium while fasting 
3:32 Day 2 fasting 
5:10 Autophagy benefits day 3 
7:47 Prolonged fasting benefits day 4
9:24 5 days of fasting results 
10:26 Refeeding tips 
11:17 Fasting contraindications 

🌟 10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4b1tp7c

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

A true fast offers many benefits and allows your body to shift into repair mode. During a fast, water, black coffee, and tea without sweeteners are generally acceptable.

One of the biggest fasting mistakes is not consuming enough sea salt. During a 5-day fast, aim for 1 to 1.5 teaspoons of high-quality sea salt spread throughout the day. Without adequate sodium, you may experience dizziness, fatigue, or keto flu symptoms.

To maximize the benefits of fasting and activate autophagy, keep mTOR low by avoiding protein, carbohydrates, and anything that significantly raises insulin. Walking is encouraged during a prolonged fast, but intense exercise such as weight training is best avoided.

On day 1, most people experience significant water weight loss and a rapid drop in insulin levels. Day 2 is often the most challenging, and many people quit before their bodies fully adapt to fat burning. Sea salt and MCT oil can help make the transition easier.

By day 3, autophagy begins to increase. Many people report improved mental clarity, reduced hunger, cellular cleanup, mitochondrial repair, and stem cell activation. Electrolytes become even more important at this stage, especially magnesium. Sun exposure and vitamin D are also beneficial.

As fasting continues, autophagy remains elevated while the body continues to target damaged cells, pathogens, liver fat, and visceral fat.

After a 5-day fast, many people experience a significant increase in human growth hormone, which may support muscle preservation, healthy aging, skin health, fat loss, and weight loss.

If you are pregnant, have diabetes, take medications, or have a medical condition, consult your doctor before fasting. If you are new to prolonged fasting, gradually work your way up before attempting a 5-day fast.

What happens if you only eat sardines for 5 days: ▶️ https://youtu.be/hmBCXFJoUcY

DATA:
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/35101148/
https://www.mdpi.com/1999-4915/9/12/372
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC2739265/
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC7080067/

videos.title: 1000hp Supra v GT-R: DRAG RACE
videos.summary_source_text:
1000hp Supra v GT-R: DRAG RACE We’re drag racing a tuned Nissan GT-R against a tuned Toyota Supra across the quarter-mile & half-mile. We’ll also be comparing them in a brake test from 100mph. 

Explore new and used car offers with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-200626

It’s time for an epic JDM showdown! 

We’ve got our hands on a Toyota Supra, and it’s going up against a Nissan GT-R… But they’ve both been tuned up to their eyeballs! 

So let’s take a closer look at the stats…

Starting with the Supra, it rolls up equipped with a 3-litre straight-six. However, this iteration is a fully built engine, and the car comes with a load of additional items, such as a turbo kit and a new gearbox. All of this combined leads to the ability to produce 1,070hp and 1,200Nm! What’s more, this is the first A90 Supra in the world to come with four wheel drive! It weighs in at 1,590kg, and all in it’s worth around £135,000. 

Then we come to the GT-R. It also has a fully built engine, and this works to deliver 1,000hp and 1,090Nm! This power is sent to all four wheels, and it’s the heavier of the two cars, tipping the scales at 1,740kg. It has an almost identical value to the GT-R, though, with a price tag of £130,000. 

So how will this one play out - will both of these cars be able to make it to the end of the runway?! Will it be a clean sweep for the more powerful Supra?! Or could the GT-R snatch it?! There’s only one way to find out… LET’S RACE!

Thanks to everyone who helped set up this race: 
- Nissan GT-R: https://www.instagram.com/acspeedtech/ 
- Toyota Supra: https://www.instagram.com/morebhpltd/ We’re drag racing a tuned Nissan GT-R against a tuned Toyota Supra across the quarter-mile & half-mile. We’ll also be comparing them in a brake test from 100mph.

Hindi - 19.06.26 - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

More often, the disease develops quietly over time, with subtle changes that are easy to dismiss or overlook. By the time a heart attack occurs, the warning signs may have been present for years without ever being recognized.

videos.title: Why lower-body lead improves sequencing #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Why lower-body lead improves sequencing #golfswing #golftips Great players begin the downswing by leading with the lower body, creating separation between the hips and the upper body. That separation allows the club to shallow and sequence more efficiently into impact. This drill, often used by Dave Phillips, helps golfers feel the correct order and build better timing.
If downswing sequencing or shallowing feels difficult, head to the link in our bio. Our coaching plans give you clear structure to improve transition and strike consistency.

videos.title: Mastering Your Golf Posture: The Secret to a Consistent Swing
videos.summary_source_text:
Mastering Your Golf Posture: The Secret to a Consistent Swing If you find yourself struggling with consistency and notice your shots veering to the right, chances are you're coming up out of your posture, causing the shaft of your club to become too vertical. Let's explore how you can correct your posture and achieve a perfect swing plane for better golf performance.

**Understanding the Swing Plane**

Often, golfers unknowingly shift out of their posture, which leads to misalignment and inconsistent swings. The secret lies in maintaining your posture throughout the swing. From analyzing over 100 PGA Tour players' Trackman data, I've discovered that these professionals consistently swing on a stable plane. This consistency is not beyond your reach, and the Blue Brick can help guide you.

**Correcting Common Posture Pitfalls**

Most players tend to stand up out of their posture, moving their hips towards the golf ball. This shift in weight towards the toes causes the hands to rise, resulting in a vertical shaft. To counteract this, focus on directing your weight to your heels as you begin your downswing. This adjustment prevents you from popping up out of your posture.

**Practicing with Purpose**

When setting up with the Blue Brick in its shallowing setting, start by feeling your weight shift to your heels. This approach ensures your posture remains intact, keeping your hands aligned under your chest instead of veering towards your toes. It might feel counterintuitive at first, but exaggerating the movement by shifting further to the heels and maintaining hand alignment helps flatten the shaft angle—a crucial aspect of the swing.

**Building Muscle Memory**

Initially, practice this posture slowly for five to ten minutes daily. Focus on moving your weight to the heels, positioning your hands under your chest to achieve a solid impact position. As you grow comfortable, gradually eliminate pauses and increase your swing speed, maintaining the proper form throughout. 

**Experience the Change**

To put this technique into practice, imagine aiming for a tight target, like a pool noodle. Concentrate on keeping your weight on your heels and hands under your chest. You'll find that staying in posture prevents the ball from flying to the right. 

Let's give this method a try. Aim for the target, swing, and observe the results. With patience and persistence, the difference in your game will be undeniable. You'll start to notice square dollar bill divots and enjoy the newfound ease in your golfing experience.

**What do I do now?**

For those eager to implement this, click the link in the comments to get your Blue Brick at the best available price. Practice this methodical approach, and soon, golf will become remarkably more manageable.

Best of luck on your journey to consistency in your swing. See you soon on the fairway! videos.title: How Does He Deke Under His Opponent’s Stick
videos.summary_source_text:
How Does He Deke Under His Opponent’s Stick The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: The Right Way to Hold Lag #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
The Right Way to Hold Lag #golfswing #golftips Lag is crucial for compression, but holding the angle without managing the clubface creates big misses. To strike irons cleanly, you need to maintain lag and allow the face to square as you rotate through impact. Paying attention to both prevents shanks, toe strikes, and weak contact while keeping the handle leading. This is the blend that produces true ball-turf compression.
If this is something you struggle with, we’ve created coaching plans that focus on fixing one clear problem at a time. Click the link in our bio to find the plan that fits your game — even if you’re not sure what to work on yet. videos.title: AutoCoder vs Lovable: Which AI Builder Makes a Real App, Not Just a Pretty Page?
videos.summary_source_text:
AutoCoder vs Lovable: Which AI Builder Makes a Real App, Not Just a Pretty Page? 🔧 Try AutoCoder yourself: https://www.autocoder.cc/en/?utm_source=ytb&utm_medium=kol&utm_campaign=BitBiasedAI
Every AI app builder demo looks magic — until you get a gorgeous landing page that does nothing. So I ran a real test: one prompt, a three-role booking marketplace, handed to AutoCoder.cc and Lovable to see which builds an actual system and which just builds a front door.

The moment I asked for a second user role is where the gap got obvious.
I used the exact same prompt everywhere, word for word: a booking marketplace where clients browse and book providers, providers manage availability and incoming bookings, and an admin oversees users and approves listings — each role with its own dashboard. 

Three roles, three views, real data moving between them. Not a landing page. A small business.

In this build I go hands-on with AutoCoder.cc — frontend, backend, and database generated together — then run the identical prompt through Lovable, with notes on where v0, Bolt, and Replit land too. The point isn't which tool is "best." It's matching the tool to whether your idea has one kind of user or several.

✅ What you'll learn
• How to tell the difference between an app that looks like a product and one that is one
• The one prompt I use to stress-test any AI app builder
• Why most builders make pages, not systems — and which ones break that pattern
• How AutoCoder generates frontend, backend, and database together
• What real role-based dashboards and permissions actually look like (client, provider, admin)
• Where Lovable, v0, Bolt, and Replit each genuinely shine
• How to pick the right builder for your idea — single-user vs multi-role
Disclosure: AutoCoder sponsored this video. The prompt, the build, and the results you see are real, and I've called out honestly where each tool wins and where it doesn't.

💬 Tell me in the comments what you'd build if you could spin up a whole multi-role system from one sentence — best ideas might become the next build video.

videos.title: The Trillion-Dollar Trick: How Musk Turned SpaceX Into an AI Empire
videos.summary_source_text:
The Trillion-Dollar Trick: How Musk Turned SpaceX Into an AI Empire Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Everyone's reporting the number. Almost nobody's explaining what it actually means. When SpaceX rang the Nasdaq bell on June 12, 2026 under the ticker SPCX, Elon Musk's net worth crossed a trillion dollars — but this milestone has far less to do with one man's wealth than with who gets to fund the future of AI.

In this breakdown we cut through the headlines and walk the mechanics: why net worth is paper wealth, not cash; how Tesla's 2018 pay package quietly built the "Elon premium" that made everything else possible; why a rocket company is suddenly valued like an AI platform; and what the concentration of this much capital in one pair of hands means for compute, the power grid, and entry-level white-collar work.

No hype. Just the structure underneath the story — and why, if you care about AI, you now have to care about capital, infrastructure, and who owns the platforms.

⏱️ Chapters below.
0:00 The headline everyone gets wrong
1:09 What the milestone actually is
2:29 The real engine was Tesla (not the way you think)
3:50 Why SpaceX was the decisive move
4:50 The AI pivot that changed the valuation
6:27 The "impossible until it wasn't" pattern
7:28 What it actually means for AI
8:36 The ripple effects beyond AI
9:39 How it actually hits you

🔔 If you want no-hype breakdowns like this one, subscribe — it genuinely helps the channel.

💬 Is this level of concentration a feature or a bug? Tell me in the comments — there's a real argument on both sides. Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/

videos.title: 🔴 LIVE | The Amateur Championship Golf | Quarter & Semi Finals
videos.summary_source_text:
🔴 LIVE | The Amateur Championship Golf | Quarter & Semi Finals SUBSCRIBE -  https://bit.ly/RandaGolfSubscribe

This year a world-class field featuring golfers from 41 countries will gather at Royal Liverpool and West Lancashire from 15 to 20 June.

This represents the Championship's record 19th staging at Hoylake, with 288 players competing for one of the top titles in amateur golf and to follow in the footsteps of past champions including Bobby Jones, José María Olazábal, Sergio Garcia and Matteo Manassero.

Contested over stroke play and then match play, the winner will earn exemptions into The Open, the US Open, a DP World Tour event and, by tradition, an invitation to compete in the Masters Tournament provided they retain their amateur status.

videos.title: It’s not your fault 👀 If your range balls look like mine do right now…
videos.summary_source_text:
It’s not your fault 👀 If your range balls look like mine do right now… Don’t get discouraged.
I promise you, these balls aren’t helping your case.

Our testing shows not only is the sound and feel what we call, “sub-optimal” but…

• Shots are MUCH shorter
• Spin increased nearly 1,000 RPM
• Flight is lower

Shall I go on…?

Look, what i’m trying to say is, you’re doing great just by making the time to practice.

But next time you want to get pissed off about your range session - consider the balls you’re striking ;) Don’t get discouraged.
I promise you, these balls aren’t helping your case.

Our testing shows not only is the sound and feel what we call, “sub-optimal” but…

• Shots are MUCH shorter
• Spin increased nearly 1,000 RPM
• Flight is lower

Shall I go on…?

Look, what i’m trying to say is, you’re doing great just by making the time to practice.

But next time you want to get pissed off about your range session - consider the balls you’re striking ;)

videos.title: Grok 5: The 6 Trillion Parameter Model That Might Not Exist Yet
videos.summary_source_text:
Grok 5: The 6 Trillion Parameter Model That Might Not Exist Yet FTC Disclosure: This video is sponsored by Semrush. 
🔗 Try the new Semrush MCP server free → https://pbee.me/a1R3Kcav
(paid affiliate link)
Everyone's calling Grok 5 a six-trillion-parameter monster that buries GPT and Claude — about a model that hasn't been released. Here's the uncomfortable part: the only thing xAI has officially confirmed about Grok 5 is three words — "currently in training."

So this is the receipts version. I separate the four things xAI has actually confirmed from the dozen the internet decided are facts, then show exactly where Grok 5 would land against GPT-4o, Claude, and Llama if the rumors hold — the 6T parameter claim, Colossus 2's ~550,000 GPUs, the million-token context, the benchmark projections that are really just arithmetic on a guess, and the delayed launch nobody wants to explain. 
Every time we cross from confirmed into rumored, I flag it. That line is the whole point.
Quick note on how this video got made: I pulled the live keyword and competitor research behind it without ever leaving my AI tools. The new Semrush MCP server (@Semrush) connects real Semrush data straight into ChatGPT, Claude, Claude Code, Cursor, and VS Code — no extra setup, no tab-switching between your AI and your SEO stack. Full walkthrough at 3:58.

What's actually real about Grok 5: the hardware, the real-time X data edge, the context window. What's rumor wearing a fact's clothing: the parameter count, the leaderboard scores, the date. If you want the hype-free breakdown before you decide whether Grok 5 is worth waiting for, this is it — and there's a question for you at the end I want answered in the comments.
If you'd rather have the evidence than the breathless version, subscribe — it's the single biggest signal that tells me to keep making these.

If you've been trying to gain driver distance by rotating harder and spinning your hips faster — this video will change how you think about the golf swing. Eric Cogorno and JT Thomas break down why arm and hand speed is the highest return on investment for golfers who want more distance with less effort. The whoosh drill and impact bag drill are practical golf drills any golfer can use to feel what real club head speed is supposed to feel like. If you leave this video without trying the whoosh drill, you're leaving distance on the table.

What You'll Learn:
• Why moving the body and club at the same rate destroys driver distance
• The "all gas no brakes" mistake most golfers make and how to fix it
• How to generate speed from your arms and hands for more effortless power
• The whoosh drill and how to use it to train real club head speed
• How the impact bag drill teaches you to swing your arms faster through the hitting zone
• Why slowing the lead side down actually makes the club go faster
• How wrist motion — down, forward, and away from the body — generates speed
• Why senior golfers get the biggest distance gains from arm and hand speed
• Golf tips any golfer can use to learn how to hit driver farther and play better golf

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

STANDOUTS & PARTY FLOATS! Carolina Hurricanes Standouts in the Stanley Cup Final & Parade Updates As we wrap up the final show of the Stanley Cup Championship Week for the Carolina Hurricanes, who were the biggest standouts in the final series in the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs? Who made the biggest impact en route to the Hurricanes' second Stanley Cup? Also, what should fans expect on Saturday for the Championship Parade in downtown Raleigh? On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on who a couple of the biggest standouts were in the Stanley Cup Final against the Vegas Golden Knights. Who stood out in terms of making an impact as the Canes bring home another Stanley Cup title? Could it be the Conn Smythe winner? Possible goalies? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on who impressed him the most in terms os going above and beyond for the Hurricanes. Who made a lasting impression throughout the playoffs and the Cup Final? Finally, Zach concludes the show giving updates on the Championship Parade, which will be on Saturday in downtown Raleigh. When does it start? Where is free parking? videos.title: GLM 5.2 Failed... But Not At Everything

GLM 5.2 Failed... But Not At Everything 🎖️ Get Tank and join the community: https://mrc.fm/cmc

videos.title: 18.06.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
18.06.26 - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Could Moving Val Nichushkin Be the Next Move For the Colorado Avalanche?
videos.summary_source_text:
Could Moving Val Nichushkin Be the Next Move For the Colorado Avalanche? Colorado Avalanche face a critical crossroads—will Valeri Nichushkin be the next big name on the move as the roster shuffle continues? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down the potential fallout from the Ross Colton trade, discuss Nichushkin’s inconsistency on and off the ice, and question if a fresh start could benefit both player and team. Is Colorado ready to part ways with a once-vital piece, or will Nichushkin rebound as a core contributor?

The conversation also unpacks a heated NHL offseason, from players requesting trades to Kelly McCrimmon’s headline-grabbing comments about the Vegas Golden Knights’ reputation. The hosts explore how Avalanche culture keeps stars like Nathan MacKinnon and Cale Makar content and loyal, what it would take to shake that bond, and why Vegas draws so much ire from around the league. Can Colorado’s front office make the right moves to stay atop the Stanley Cup hunt?

Ron Chenoy-Imagn Images

videos.title: Gemini CLI Dies Today... Meet Antigravity CLI
videos.summary_source_text:
Gemini CLI Dies Today... Meet Antigravity CLI Join the community. Get Tank, meet other AI builders 👉 https://mrc.fm/cmc

I tested the new agy command to see what survived. Antigravity CLI is built in Go, runs async multi-agent workflows, and keeps Agent Skills, Hooks, Subagents and plugins. There's no 1:1 feature parity and it's closed source now. Enterprise and paid API users keep Gemini CLI for now. I'll show you how to migrate before your scripts, cron jobs and CI break.

videos.title: Microsoft And DeepSeek Are Launching New AI Together
videos.summary_source_text:
Microsoft And DeepSeek Are Launching New AI Together Microsoft and DeepSeek may be coming together inside Copilot Cowork, and the timing is huge. Microsoft just made Cowork generally available worldwide with usage-based billing, while Axios reports that DeepSeek could become a lower-cost model option hosted on Azure. The bigger story is that Microsoft is turning Copilot into a multi-model AI agent platform built for real company work.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉️ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com

📌 What You’ll See:
Microsoft Copilot Cowork is now generally available
SOURCE: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/blog/2026/06/16/copilot-cowork-is-now-generally-available/
Microsoft weighs DeepSeek for Copilot Cowork
SOURCE: https://www.axios.com/2026/06/16/microsoft-copilot-cowork-tokenmaxxing-cowork
Microsoft makes big AI inroads in China by selling OpenAI models
SOURCE: https://www.businesstimes.com.sg/companies-markets/telcos-media-tech/microsoft-makes-big-ai-inroads-china-selling-openai-models
Microsoft introduces Web IQ for AI agents

This is bigger than another Copilot update. Microsoft is moving from one AI assistant to a full agent platform that can use OpenAI, Claude, Cowork 1, and possibly DeepSeek. If Copilot starts routing real company work across different models, the enterprise AI race changes fast.

videos.title: The Footwork To Catch More Passes
videos.summary_source_text:
The Footwork To Catch More Passes The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: This Pushup Beats Regular Pushups for Chest Growth
videos.summary_source_text:
This Pushup Beats Regular Pushups for Chest Growth Want to build a bigger chest with just push ups? The problem might not be that push ups don’t work. It might be that you’re doing the same push up variation over and over again and expecting your chest to grow from it.

Build Muscle Without Weights - https://athleanx.com/xero
Subscribe to This Channel Here: http://bit.ly/2b0coMW

In this video, Jeff Cavaliere breaks down one of the most overlooked push up techniques for chest growth: the prisoner push up. At first glance, it may look like a half-rep push up, but that is exactly the point. By staying in the lower portion of the push up, you can shift more of the focus onto the chest and shoulders while reducing how much the triceps limit the set.

A traditional full range of motion push up is still one of the best bodyweight exercises for building the upper body. It trains the chest, shoulders, triceps and core all at once. But when your goal is to build a bigger chest with bodyweight training, the top portion of the push up can become a problem. As you press toward lockout, the triceps take over more of the work. That means your triceps may fatigue before your chest gets enough volume to grow.

That is where the prisoner push up becomes so effective.

Instead of locking out every rep, you stay in the bottom range of motion, where the chest has to do more of the work. This allows you to accumulate more chest-focused volume, create more metabolic stress in the pecs and continue the set without the triceps becoming the limiting factor too early. If you have ever felt push ups more in your arms than your chest, this is a variation you need to try.

When training with bodyweight exercises, the mechanical tension is usually lower than what you would get from heavy dumbbell bench presses or barbell bench presses. That means volume and intensity become even more important. If you want push ups to build muscle, you need to find ways to increase the challenge, increase the number of quality reps, shorten rest periods and make each variation more targeted.

In this video, Jeff shows how to use the prisoner push up as a chest-building tool, then how to progress it with harder push up variations that keep the same bottom-range focus. These include angled push ups, staggered push ups, more explosive push ups and archer push ups. Each variation gives you a different way to overload the chest without needing a bench, dumbbells, cables or a full gym setup.

The key is understanding what actually builds muscle: mechanical tension, eccentric overload and metabolic stress. With push ups, you may not get the same heavy loading you would from weights, but you can still create an effective chest workout by manipulating range of motion, tempo, exercise difficulty, rep volume and rest periods.

If your chest workouts at home have stopped working, or if regular push ups feel too easy, this video will show you how to make push ups harder and more effective for building muscle. You don’t need to abandon push ups. You just need to know how to use them the right way.

Try adding prisoner push ups to your next chest workout and see how quickly your pecs start to light up. Focus on staying low, keeping tension on the chest, pushing through the heel of your hands and driving every rep with intent. As you get stronger, move to more advanced push up variations while still keeping the chest under constant tension.

If you are looking for a complete step-by-step bodyweight workout program that shows you how to build muscle without weights, check out ATHLEAN-X XERO at https://athleanx.com/xero. It is designed to help you build a lean, muscular body using bodyweight training, smart exercise progressions and the same science-based approach used in every ATHLEAN-X program.

Whether your goal is to build a bigger chest, get better at push ups, train at home, build muscle without equipment or finally make bodyweight chest workouts feel challenging again, this video will show you how to get more out of every rep.

For more science-based workouts, bodyweight exercises, chest exercises, push up variations and muscle building tips, make sure to subscribe to ATHLEAN-X and turn on notifications so you never miss a new video. videos.title: This Optical illusion Is Secretly Ruining Your Golf Swing
videos.summary_source_text:
This Optical illusion Is Secretly Ruining Your Golf Swing This could be the reason you never solve your driver problems.What if I told you that an optical illusion is causing your 2 way miss and you do not even know it?

Most golfers spend years changing their swing, grip and technique trying to fix shots that go left one hole and right the next. The truth is the problem may have nothing to do with your swing at all.

In this video, Alex Elliott reveals the hidden visual mistake that is secretly ruining your driver and shows you the simple adjustment that can transform your accuracy almost instantly.

You will discover how the optical illusion is tricking you every single round, why your driver miss keeps switching between left and right, how to set up correctly for straighter more consistent drives, the simple drill Alex uses to help golfers hit more fairways, and how to gain confidence every time you stand on the tee.

If you are tired of losing balls, missing fairways and never knowing where your next drive is going, this is a video you cannot afford to skip.

videos.title: Why Do Some People Recover Better Than Others?
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Do Some People Recover Better Than Others? Some patients seem to tolerate major surgery remarkably well, while others struggle with complications during recovery. Looking deeper suggests that the difference wasn't just the procedure itself. It was how well the body could balance its stress response. That pattern suggests that health isn't just about managing stress, it's about maintaining balance in the face of it.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

videos.title: Lucas Wallmark – lämnade mångmiljonbelopp på bordet
videos.summary_source_text:
Lucas Wallmark – lämnade mångmiljonbelopp på bordet Shoot The Puck är en podcast av hockeynews.se

Lucas Wallmark är på väg att få göra sin a-lagsdebut i moderklubben Björklöven och det händer samtidigt som det är 25 år sedan klubben spelade i SHL.
30-åringen fortsätter att gå sin egen väg.
Han lämnade NHL som 25-åring.
Han lämnar nu Schweiz vid 30 års ålder – och många miljoner på bordet för att uppleva drömmen i hemstaden.
Hockeynews Henrik Sjöberg har träffat Wallmark i Umeå och gått till botten med beslutet.

Och mycket annat: 
1.00: GWG-mästare i mäktigt skägg
3.00: Faktaruta – lär känna Lucas Wallmark
6.15: Avslöjar – så är Rönnberg som coach
7.45: Samtalet med Sörensen som låg bakom avgörandet i finalen
10.30: ”Rod The Bod” Brind´Amour roll i Wallmarks karriär
13.45: Då blev en comeback i Löven verklig
15.45: Förhandlingen i Fribourg – och Luleå
18.00: Derbyt alla har väntat på – Wallmark om Skellefteå
20.35: Spelet bakom sexårskontraktet
22.15: Så låg Wallmark bakom stjärnvärvningen
23.30: Lövens logga snyggast i SHL?
25.00: Därför lämnar han miljoner på bordet: ”Kanske ångrar det”
35.00: Synen på lagbygget just nu
40.00: Bullen på en travbana nära dig?
41.30: Så hanterar han pressen utifrån
44.50: Wallmark I sin prime just nu?
48.00: Framtidsvisionen Shoot The Puck är en podcast av hockeynews.se

videos.title: Your Irons Have A Secret Superpower… and You're Ignoring It
videos.summary_source_text:
Your Irons Have A Secret Superpower… and You're Ignoring It Most golfers are trying to do something with their irons that actually makes ball striking harder.

The truth is, your iron club already has a built-in superpower — it is designed to get the ball airborne. Yet many golfers instinctively try to help the ball into the air by leaning back, flipping their wrists, and adding loft through impact. Unfortunately, that is exactly what leads to poor strikes, weak shots, and inconsistent distance.

In this video, I use a simple demonstration with a ping pong bat to show why this instinct makes sense, why it works with a flat surface, and why it causes so many problems with a golf club.

Once you understand what your irons are designed to do, you can stop fighting the club and start creating cleaner contact, better compression, and more consistent iron shots.

If you struggle with thin shots, fat shots, weak strikes, or inconsistent ball striking, this is a concept you need to understand.

videos.summary_source_text:
WASN'T EXPECTING THAT! 😱 McLaren Series 3 Irons #mclaren #series3 #golf #golfgear #subscribe 

Are the McLaren Series 3 Irons one of the best-feeling irons on the market right now?

In this Series 3 Iron Review, I put these irons through a full on-course and launch monitor test to see whether the performance matches the hype. What immediately stood out was the incredible feel at impact, but what impressed me even more was the consistency on mishits across the entire iron set.

Many irons perform well from the middle of the face, but the real test is how they respond when you don't strike them perfectly. The Series 3 irons delivered impressive distance control, forgiveness, and consistency even when contact wasn't ideal.

In this review you'll discover:

🏌️ First impressions of the McLaren Series 3 irons

🏌️ Distance and consistency testing

videos.title: Tesla Pi Phone 2026: The Truth Nobody Wants to Show You
videos.summary_source_text:
Tesla Pi Phone 2026: The Truth Nobody Wants to Show You Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
The Tesla Pi Phone is the most-hyped product with Elon Musk's name on it — and it's the one product that has never existed. No FCC filing. No prototype. No patent. Just a 2021 concept render the internet refused to let die.

So in this breakdown we do the BitBiased thing: we check the filing instead of the thumbnail. First, the real Musk machine of 2026 — the SpaceX–xAI merger, the Austin robotaxi that half-works, Starlink quietly printing money, Grok welded to the loudest feed on earth, and Optimus still stuck in prototype. 
Then the full Pi Phone reality check: where the myth came from, why it keeps rising from the dead, and the ten-second test for telling signal from hype.
If the only evidence is a render and a countdown timer, you already have your answer.

videos.title: Sommarfest med Matkoma-Anton
videos.summary_source_text:
Sommarfest med Matkoma-Anton Havets Wallenbergare:
400 g lax
400 g torsk
1 bit varmrökt lax
2 dl vispgrädde
2 äggulor
zest av en citron
1 spansk peppar
1 liten bunt dill
2 dl ströbröd
1 tsk salt
vitpeppar
olja och smör till stekningen

Kaptenens Skagenröra:
några hundra gram grovhackade räkor
1 msk löjrom
2 dl majonnäs
2 dl creme fraiche
en liten finhackad rödlök
ett litet knippe finhackad dill
salt och peppar

Smörsvängda ärtor:
400 g små fina ärtor
1 schalottenlök
några msk smör
saften från en halv pressad citron

Servera med nykokt färskpotatis

videos.title: 50% of Heart Attack Victims Had “Normal” Lab Results
videos.summary_source_text:
50% of Heart Attack Victims Had “Normal” Lab Results Is LDL really the “bad cholesterol”? Uncover the truth behind common cholesterol myths, what high LDL and cholesterol levels actually mean, and whether elevated LDL is as dangerous as you’ve been led to believe.

0:00 Is LDL bad?
0:21 LDL cholesterol explained 
2:00 Two types of LDL cholesterol
2:38 Advanced lipid profile test
3:56 Cholesterol research
6:40 Cholesterol and heart disease prevention
10:52 Clogged arteries and LDL
11:28 Large-buoyant LDL vs. small-dense LDL 
11:48 Statins 
13:07 High cholesterol levels in healthy people

🌟 10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/43M2FUm

Explore the hidden factors behind heart disease, cholesterol levels, and cardiovascular health:
▶️ https://youtu.be/W9qSb6--XfE
▶️ https://youtu.be/dQqXD-8osb8
▶️ https://youtu.be/hq9Al6LR2O4

Read this article to learn more about your cholesterol levels: https://www.drberg.com/blog/how-to-read-and-understand-cholesterol-numbers

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

LDL is a protein made by the liver and serves many important functions in the body. LDL provides the raw materials needed to produce hormones such as estrogen, testosterone, and cortisol. It is also involved in the production of vitamin D and bile.

More than half of all heart attacks occur in people with normal LDL levels, raising important questions about the role of LDL in cardiovascular disease.

There are two main types of LDL: small, dense LDL and large, buoyant LDL. Small, dense LDL is associated with inflammation, insulin resistance, and chronic stress. Large, buoyant LDL is generally considered non-pathogenic. 

Despite the focus on lowering LDL cholesterol, there is limited evidence that simply reducing LDL levels acts as heart disease prevention. Higher LDL levels have even been associated with longevity in some research.

Many people are prescribed statins without determining which type of LDL they have. An advanced lipid profile can help identify whether your LDL is primarily small dense LDL or large buoyant LDL, providing a more complete picture of your cardiovascular health.

DATA:
https://www.nejm.org/doi/full/10.1056/NEJMoa1200303
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/28684083/
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC7387892/
https://www.ahajournals.org/doi/10.1161/CIRCULATIONAHA.124.068885
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC10982736/
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/15210526/

videos.title: BMW X5M v Range Rover SV: DRAG RACE
videos.summary_source_text:
BMW X5M v Range Rover SV: DRAG RACE We’re drag racing a Range Rover SV, Range Rover OCTA & BMW X5 M over the quarter-mile and half-mile, while also comparing them in a brake test from 100mph.

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-19-05

It’s time for a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8 drag race! 

All three cars in this drag race have the exact same BMW 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8 engine under their bonnets. However, that’s where the similarities end! So let’s take a closer look at each car. 

First up is the Range Rover SV, which produces 635hp and 800Nm, and it weighs in at 2,485kg. This particular car is valued at £139,995. 

On the other side of the line-up we have the OCTA. It also sends 635hp & 800Nm to all four wheels, but it’s also the heaviest car here, tipping the scales at 2,510kg! What’s more, it’s also the most expensive here, rolling up with a price tag of £158,245kg. 

Then finally we have the BMW. It claims to ‘only’ produce 625hp and 750Nm, but it’s also both the lightest and cheapest car here, coming in at 2,440kg and £137,330 respectively. 

The question is, is BMW telling the truth with the power output in the X5 M? There’s only one way to find out for sure… LET’S RACE! 

Thanks to everyone who helped us set up this race:
- OCTA: https://www.instagram.com/thecarfilmingsafetyguy/ 
- SV: https://www.instagram.com/ian911evans/ 
- X5M: https://www.instagram.com/motortimegroup/ 
- @DrivenPlus We’re drag racing a Range Rover SV, Range Rover OCTA & BMW X5 M over the quarter-mile and half-mile, while also comparing them in a brake test from 100mph.

videos.title: CULTURE DEFINED! How the 2025-26 Carolina Hurricanes Embodied "Carolina Culture"
videos.summary_source_text:
CULTURE DEFINED! How the 2025-26 Carolina Hurricanes Embodied "Carolina Culture" When it comes to culture, the Carolina Hurricanes set the standard for it. That said, what is "culture defining" when it comes to Carolina? On the Thursday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes embodied what it means to be a Carolina Hurricane in 2025-26. Every season we hear about how it starts with Rod Brind'Amour and how the culture makes Raleigh special. While that is true, there seems to be a sense that this iteration took that to heart and won a cup based on that mindset. Secondly, it was revealed that the "Blue Collar Press" after workouts was getting this team ready to lift the Stanley Cup one day. How do things like that give what happened more gravitas after the fact? What is it about this team that makes things different compared not only to the NHL but sports as a whole? Finally, Zach wraps up the show by sharing his thoughts on even off the ice, the Hurricanes are set up for the future. When it comes to the roster, they're in a great place. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.
